title: UX-designer med några års erfarenhet
description:
Vill du vara med och bidra till utvecklingen av digitala lösningar i en internationell miljö? Vi söker nu en UX/UI-designer som vill bli en viktig del av ett utvecklingsteam med bas i Lund.
  
I rollen arbetar du nära utvecklare och andra designers, med fokus på att skapa användarvänliga och visuellt genomtänkta lösningar. Du kommer arbeta tätt tillsammans med utvecklare i ett internationellt team, där engelska är arbetsspråk. Resor kan förekomma.
  
Vi söker dig som är nyfiken, driven och trygg i din kompetens. Du har ett genuint intresse för teknik och en god förmåga att sätta dig in i och förstå komplexa tekniska lösningar. Du är kommunikativ, flexibel och har ett pragmatiskt förhållningssätt – du kan anpassa dig när förutsättningarna förändras och hittar vägar framåt även utanför givna ramar.
  
  

**Vi ser gärna att du har:**  

Relevant utbildning inom exempelvis interaktionsdesign, digital design eller motsvarande (t.ex. civilingenjör med designinriktning)
  
  

Erfarenhet av att arbeta med både UX och UI
  
  

Förmåga att samarbeta effektivt i team, särskilt tillsammans med utvecklare
  
  

God kommunikativ förmåga på engelska
  
  

Stor vikt läggs vid personliga egenskaper. Vi tror att du är en person som är öppen för andras perspektiv och trivs i ett samarbetsorienterat sammanhang.
  
Vi jobbar med löpande urval - så vänta inte med att skicka in din ansökan!

title: Senior UX-designer – Digitala tjänster inom offentlig sektor | Stockholm
description:
Om uppdraget
  
Vi söker nu en senior UX-designer för ett uppdrag där du får vara med och utveckla och vidareutveckla digitala tjänster och e-tjänster med höga krav på användbarhet, tillgänglighet och kvalitet.
  
I rollen ansvarar du för att säkerställa att lösningar utformas utifrån användarnas behov, verksamhetens mål och gällande krav inom digital förvaltning. Du arbetar genom hela designprocessen – från analys och behovsförståelse till konceptutveckling, prototypframtagning, validering och införande.
  
Du blir en viktig del av ett tvärfunktionellt team där du samarbetar nära verksamhet, utvecklare och andra intressenter för att skapa användarvänliga och effektiva digitala tjänster.
  
Dina arbetsuppgifter
  
Driva och ansvara för UX-arbetet genom hela designprocessen
  
  

Genomföra behovsanalyser och användarcentrerad research
  
  

Ta fram koncept, wireframes, prototyper och designlösningar
  
  

Planera och facilitera workshops samt behovsinsamling med olika intressenter
  
  

Säkerställa att lösningar uppfyller krav inom tillgänglighet och användbarhet
  
  

Samarbeta nära utvecklingsteam, verksamhet och andra nyckelpersoner
  
  

Bidra till långsiktig utveckling av digitala tjänster och användarupplevelser
  
  

Förväntade leveranser
  
Användarcentrerade designlösningar för komplexa digitala tjänster
  
  

Prototyper och koncept som validerats mot användarbehov
  
  

Dokumenterade användarflöden och UX-underlag
  
  

Genomförda workshops och behovsanalyser
  
  

Design som uppfyller krav enligt WCAG 2.1 AA eller senare
  
  

Lösningar anpassade för tillgänglig och hållbar digital förvaltning
  
  

✅ Din profil / Obligatoriska kompetenser
  
Minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av UX-design eller interaktionsdesign
  
  

Minst 3 års erfarenhet av utveckling av komplexa digitala tjänster, e-tjänster, självbetjäningslösningar eller verksamhetskritiska webbapplikationer
  
  

Erfarenhet från minst två större uppdrag där du haft en ledande UX-roll med ansvar för hela UX-processen från behov till färdig lösning
  
  

Erfarenhet av arbete i tvärfunktionella agila utvecklingsteam
  
  

Erfarenhet från organisationer med många intressenter, komplexa användarflöden och höga krav på kvalitet, säkerhet och förvaltning
  
  

Dokumenterad erfarenhet av design enligt WCAG 2.1 AA eller senare
  
  

Kunskap om DOS-lagen och dess krav på digital tillgänglighet
  
  

Erfarenhet av att omsätta tillgänglighetskrav till praktisk design
  
  

Mycket goda kunskaper i Figma
  
  

Dokumenterad erfarenhet av workshopledning och behovsinsamling
  
  

Relevant eftergymnasial utbildning inom UX-design, interaktionsdesign eller motsvarande
  
  

Kompetensnivå 4 enligt gällande ramavtal
  
  

⭐ Meriterande färdigheter
  
Erfarenhet från offentlig verksamhet
  
  

Erfarenhet av tjänstedesign
  
  

Personliga egenskaper
  
Initiativrik och lösningsorienterad
  
  

Kommunikativ och samarbetsorienterad
  
  

Självständig och ansvarstagande
  
  

Strukturerad med god prioriteringsförmåga
  
  

Van att skapa samsyn mellan olika intressenter
  
  

Trygg i komplexa miljöer med många beroenden
  
  

Viktig information
  
För att uppfylla uppdragets krav behöver du kunna redovisa ett jämförbart referensuppdrag genomfört under de senaste 36 månaderna.
  
Referensuppdraget ska vara relevant för uppdragets innehåll och kunna styrkas enligt kundens anvisningar. Information om referensuppdrag kommer att efterfrågas i rekryteringsprocessen.
  
Plats
  
Stockholm (hybrid)
  
⏱ Omfattning
  
80–100%
  
Period
  
2026-08-18 – 2026-12-31
  
Förlängning
  
Möjlighet till förlängning finns (option till 2027-07-01)
  
Sista ansökningsdag
  
2026-06-23
  
Sway Sourcing är en innovativ rekryteringspartner som specialiserar sig på att matcha rätt talang med rätt företag – snabbt och effektivt. Vårt huvudfokus ligger inom Ekonomi, Administration, HR, Marknad och IT, men vi har även den breda expertis och flexibilitet som krävs för att leverera skräddarsydda rekryteringslösningar inom alla branscher.
  
Trots att vi är en relativt ny aktör har vi redan byggt förtroende hos många av Sveriges största företag och arbetar både nationellt och internationellt. Med baser i Sverige och Spanien erbjuder vi en unik kombination av lokal expertis och global räckvidd. Vårt starka nätverk och djupa branschinsikter gör oss till en självklar partner för företag som vill ligga steget före i sin rekrytering.

title: Senior Infotainment Test and Verification Engineer
description:
**We seek a Senior Infotainment Test and Verification Engineer to join a global automotive company in Gothenburg.**

**Description of the assignment**


Contribute to the implementation of agreed verification strategies, plans, and test activities for infotainment systems


Perform functional and system-level testing of infotainment features


Design, develop, and maintain test cases


Execute tests both in bench environments and vehicles


Perform reviews of test basis, requirements, and test cases


Track, analyse, and report test results, deviations, defects, and verification risks to the test leader and project stakeholders


Participate in test expeditions, including vehicle-based validation in different markets and environments


Contribute to a culture of continuous improvement, including improvements in test methods, tools, automation, and efficiency


**The verification scope is primarily at the functional level, covering key infotainment domains such as:**


Navigation


Connectivity & Telematics


Radio / DAB


Apple CarPlay & Android Auto


Voice Assistant


UX/UI


Digital key


Mobile APP


APP Store / Apps


**Qualifications and skills required**


B.Sc. Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or similar technical education


At least 5 years of experience within automotive and/or infotainment testing


Strong test analysis and problem-solving skills


Experience with test case design techniques and structured verification approaches


High communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively in cross-functional teams


Valid driving license


***Personal attributes***

Self-driven and structured, with the ability to take ownership of verification tasks


Comfortable working in a dynamic development environment


Proactive in identifying risks, gaps, and improvement areas


Transparent and clear in reporting status, progress, and issues


Strong collaboration mindset with both internal teams and external stakeholders


**Other:** The assignment includes travel. Test expeditions of approximately two weeks, multiple times per year, are a mandatory and integral part of the role. Apart from travel, the work is on-site (Lindholmen area).


This is a full-time consultant position through Incluso. Start is July 2026. **This is a six-month** limited contract. With the possibility of being extended. This role is 100% onsite.  

  

Please submit your CV as soon as possible. We review the applications on an ongoing basis.


For more information about this role, please get in touch with Karin Persson**.**

title: Senior Infotainment Test Lead Engineer
description:
We are looking for an experienced Infotainment Test Lead Engineer to join the Infotainment department at a global automotive company in Gothenburg.


In this role, you will lead the verification of in-vehicle infotainment systems, with a strong focus on customer-facing features and overall test execution across development programs. You will work closely with Infotainment function developers, system engineers, UX/design teams, and other verification functions, contributing to high-quality infotainment solutions delivered to vehicles.


As Test Lead, you will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and driving test activities across the team. While creating structure and maintaining a clear test strategy are important, this role requires a highly flexible and adaptive approach. Project priorities, deliveries, and focus areas can change rapidly, requiring continuous re-prioritisation and frequent task switching for both the Test Lead and the test team.


The test lead role will be combined with active contribution to test activities when required. The ideal candidate thrives in a dynamic environment, can balance long-term planning with short-term execution, and is comfortable leading a team through changing priorities while maintaining focus on quality and delivery.

**Description of the assignment**

* Lead and coordinate verification activities for infotainment systems across ongoing development programs
* Define, maintain, and continuously adapt verification strategies, plans, priorities, and test activities based on project needs and delivery targets
* Lead and support the test team in daily prioritisation, task allocation, and follow-up execution
* Ensure efficient test coverage through functional and system-level verification, primarily at the vehicle level
* Drive reviews on a test basis, requirements, test cases, and verification results
* Track, analyse, and communicate test status, quality risks, deviations, and defects to project stakeholders
* Participate in test expeditions, including vehicle-based validation in different markets and environments
* Drive continuous improvements in test methods, processes, tools, automation, and team efficiency.
* Secure vehicle SW baseline is kept updated for infotainment team test vehicles.
* Active participation and contribution to test activities are expected.

**Qualifications and skills required for the role**

* B.Sc. in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or similar technical education
* At least 6 years of experience within automotive and/or infotainment verification, including test leadership responsibilities
* Experience leading verification activities and coordinating cross-functional test teams
* Strong test strategy, planning, risk assessment, and problem-solving skills
* Ability to manage multiple priorities and make effective decisions in a fast-changing development environment
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
* Valid driving license
* Must be able to travel freely throughout the EU and to non-EU countries in the Western Balkans, including Serbia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, North Macedonia, Albania, and other countries in the region

**Personal attributes**

* Strong leadership and coordination skills with a hands-on mindset
* Thrives in a dynamic environment with changing priorities and frequent re-planning
* Able to balance long-term planning with rapid response to new risks, issues, and business needs
* Transparent and clear in communication, status reporting, and decision-making
* Strong collaboration mindset with both internal teams and external stakeholders

**Other:** Test expeditions of approximately two weeks, multiple times per year, are a mandatory and integral part of the role. Apart from travel, the work is on-site at the office in Gothenburg (Lindholmen area).


This is a full-time consultant position through Incluso. Start is "**July 2026.** **This is a six-month** contract, with the possibility of extension. This role is 100% onsite. Travel within Europe is a part of the work.  

  

Please submit your CV as soon as possible, as we will review applications on an ongoing basis.


For more information about this role, don't hesitate to get in touch with Karin Persson.

title: Senior Infotainment Function Owner
description:
**We are looking for a Senior Infotainment Function Owner to join a global automotive company in Gothenburg.**

**Description of the assignment**


Ensure infotainment functions comply with EU market requirements, regulations, and legal frameworks


Define EU-specific functional expectations and product adaptations based on market needs, legal frameworks, and customer insights


Act as the European functional representative towardsglobal development teams and suppliers


Drive functional acceptance and performance validation in vehicle environments to ensure features meet European market expectations


Identifygapsbetweendelivered functionalityand European market expectations


Define and drive change requests and improvement proposals based on Voice of Customer, quality feedback, market analysis, and internal assessments


Provide input to the product roadmap and feature prioritisation based on European market needs and regulatory requirements


Work closely with the Infotainment test team and UX/HMI specialists to ensure strong usability, validation activities, and customer experience

**Qualifications and skills required**


Bachelor's or Master's in Electrical Engineering, Software Engineering, Computer Engineering, or equivalent technical background


Minimum 5 years of experience in automotive infotainment systems


Strong understanding of European market requirements and customer expectations


Experience working with infotainment domains such as Navigation, Connectivity, Radio, or digital services


Experience working with customer-facing vehicle functions, including user experience validation and vehicle-level functional verification


Good understanding of EU legal and regulatory requirements relevant to automotive infotainment (e.g., GDPR)

**Personal attributes**


Strong ownership mindset with the ability to independently drive functional topics


Analytical and customer-focused, with the ability to translate feedback and data into concrete improvements


Structured and transparent in reporting status, risks, and priorities


Comfortable working in a dynamic development environment with multiple stakeholders


Strong collaboration mindset with test teams, UX specialists, and development teams

**Other**


Test expeditions of 1-2 weeks should be seen as a natural part of the work. Apart from travel, the work is on-site (Lindholmen area).


This is a full-time consultant position through Incluso. Start is **J**uly 2026. This is a six-monthlimited contract, with the possibility of extension. This role is 100% onsite.  

  

Please submit your CV as soon as possible, as we will review applications on an ongoing basis.


For more information about this role, please get in touch with Karin Persson**.**

title: AI Technical Writer (HealthTec Domain)
Senior Product Designer – Remote/Stockholm
description:
Senior Product Designer – Remote/Stockholm


### **Om uppdraget**

Vi söker en senior Product Designer för ett uppdrag där du kommer att utveckla och förbättra användarupplevelsen i rapporteringsflöden för en global konsumentprodukt. Rollen kombinerar höga krav på användbarhet med regulatoriska, juridiska och säkerhetsrelaterade krav i en komplex och föränderlig miljö.


Du kommer att analysera befintliga användarresor, identifiera förbättringsområden och designa nya lösningar som fungerar för olika användartyper, marknader och plattformar. Uppdraget omfattar även att utforska hur AI- och LLM-baserade lösningar kan förbättra insamling, hantering och kategorisering av användarrapporter.

### **Dina arbetsuppgifter ️**

* Analysera och förbättra befintliga rapporteringsflöden och användarupplevelser.
* Designa nya interaktioner och användargränssnitt för olika plattformar.
* Ta fram designspecifikationer och underlag för utvecklingsteam.
* Säkerställa att lösningar uppfyller regulatoriska och juridiska krav.
* Samarbeta nära produktägare, utvecklare, juridiska funktioner och säkerhetsteam.
* Utforska och utvärdera AI- och LLM-baserade lösningar inom rapporterings- och modereringsprocesser.

### **Förväntade leveranser**

* Förbättrade användarflöden för rapportering och ärendehantering.
* Designspecifikationer och dokumentation för utveckling.
* Skalbara och användarvänliga lösningar anpassade för flera marknader.
* Designförslag som balanserar användarbehov med regulatoriska krav.
* Bidrag till utvecklingen av AI-stödda användarupplevelser.

### **Din profil**

#### **Obligatoriska kompetenser**

* Erfarenhet av UX-design inom Trust & Safety, Compliance, Content Moderation eller liknande områden.
* Erfarenhet av rapporteringsflöden, modereringsverktyg eller policystyrda användargränssnitt.
* Erfarenhet av konsumentprodukter i stor skala, gärna med fokus på mobila plattformar.
* Erfarenhet av nära samarbete med Product, Engineering, Legal och Policy-funktioner.
* Förmåga att fatta välgrundade designbeslut i komplexa miljöer.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att leverera design av hög kvalitet i högt tempo.

#### **Meriterande färdigheter**

* Erfarenhet av AI-drivna eller konversationsbaserade användarupplevelser.
* Erfarenhet av regulatoriska eller säkerhetsrelaterade produkter och tjänster.

### **Personliga egenskaper**

* Analytisk och lösningsorienterad.
* Stark samarbetsförmåga.
* Självständig och initiativtagande.
* Kommunikativ med förmåga att förankra designbeslut hos olika intressenter.
* Strukturerad och kvalitetsmedveten.

### **Information ️**

**Plats:** Remote / Stockholm

**Omfattning:** 100%

**Period:** 2026-06-22 – 2026-12-21

**Möjlighet till förlängning:** Möjlighet till förlängning finns

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 2026-06-17

title: Senior UX/ Motion Designers
description:
Are you a passionate UX/UI Designer looking for new challenges? Are you interested in creating user-friendly products and collaborating with others to come up with the best solutions? For this role, we are looking for you with a background in information architecture. Do you also see the advantages of getting variety and experience from different clients and industries but developing with one and the same employer? Then you should read on!

 **ROLE DESCRIPTION**  

As a Senior UX/ Motion Designer with us, you work for our customers, directly in their design organization or in our project operations. Our customers mainly develop technical solutions, products and services. They are innovative and world leaders in their respective technical fields. Our design business is under construction and we want you to help shape it. Internal working methods and our offer to customers are constantly developing, and we want you to be an important player in this work. To fit the role, we believe that you have a solution-focused way of working, an open mindset, and that you contribute to new or better ways to create value. Employment with us means both security and freedom, where we support you as much as you want and need. For us, it is important that you are allowed to participate in shaping your career path and that you are involved in influencing ESSIQ as a company and workplace.  

  

**QUALIFICATIONS**  

We are not looking for employees, we are looking for employees - for ESSIQers! Below are the basic qualifications for the position, but we will also place great emphasis on your personality.

* Master or Bachelor in Industrial design or Service design
* Minimum 4 years of work experience in relevant field
* Experience of Motion design and Lighting design within Automotive industry.
* Professional ability in Adobe XD, Figma, Sketch and similar tools
* Some programming knowledge, Javascript, Typescript etc.
* Fluent in English in speech and writing.

  

If you lack any of the qualifications but still think you would be a good fit for this role, I encourage you to apply anyway!  

  

**About ESSIQ and our offer to you:**  

ESSIQ was founded in 2005 with the future vision of creating a more sustainable technology industry. We create sustainable employees through a strong community and an equal working climate, while at the same time creating a better and greener future with innovative technology. At ESSIQ, our employees are our success and it is a matter of course to share knowledge and solve challenges together. With us, you get the opportunity to develop together with passionated, competent and experienced colleagues and, of course, with the industry's most interesting customers. You are given good opportunities to influence your own role and situation and we value your commitment highly.  

  

You don't work 24 hours a day, but we care about you all the time. Work and free time don't have to be two separate components that fight for your attention and with our employee package you choose how you want to distribute your income according to what is most important to you. We believe in a good teamwork and that's why we arrange a number of both professional and social activities every year, everything from small get-togethers to large parties where we can socialize and have fun together at work aswell as after.

 **APPLICATION**


Selection and interviews will take place continuously, so send your application today! Please respect that we do not accept any applications by email.


Questions about the role? Contact: Johan Kalin, Johan.kalin@essiq.se  

  

Do you want to know more about ESSIQ?  

Visit http://essiq.se and follow us on our social media!

title: Equipment as a Service/Rental - Digital Product Owner
description:
Transport is at the core of modern society. Imagine using your expertise to shape sustainable transport and infrastructure solutions for the future. If you seek to make a difference on a global scale, working with next-gen technologies and the sharpest collaborative teams, then we could be a perfect match.


The Volvo Financial Services Global D&IT team is seeking a Digital Product Owner (DPO) for our equipment as a service platform to act as the link between the stakeholders and the development teams.

 **What you will do**  

As a DPO, you will lead an agile team of solution professionals, playing a key role in transforming the product vision into value creation. You will turn the product roadmap into working deliverables in your team backlog, aligned with the overall strategy and product vision. You will be a member of the stable team responsible for managing the team backlog.

  

Your starting point will be to, together with your colleagues at VFS (Volvo Financial Services), and in the broad cross-functional network at the Volvo Group, take responsibility in the following areas:

* Lead a diverse global team focused on product engineering, development, and implementation
* Ensure transparency, understanding, and dependencies of the team backlog.
* Clarify team purpose, strategy, and business priorities.
* Ensure that the digital product is developed and maintained in compliance with the given architecture, security requirements, and digital product strategy until decommissioning is completed.
* Manage budget and financial follow-up for the owned digital products and solutions
* Manage dependencies and collaborate with other teams and business partners, as needed.
* Secure that SLAs (Service Level Agreements) are established and fulfilled end-to-end for any solutions managed by the team, for both the delivery and consuming services.
* Manage life cycle management and support of digital products and solutions in team scope.
* Ensure that the team regularly collects feedback on implemented work.
* Contribute to digital product roadmap and capacity planning.
* Be responsible for team and culture development to secure proper capacity and capability for its delivery.

 **Your future team**  

You will report directly to the DPAO, New Services. In VFS, we demonstrate a clear vision to continue Transforming Together, a global mindset, and a proven record of successfully developing people, teams, culture, and leadership.

  

In many of our markets, VFS has won the Great Place to Work Award, where Great Work is done. By interacting with each other as an on-site business, we build relationships. This allows us to work together more efficiently and form stronger bonds with our colleagues and customers. The preferred location is Gothenburg, Sweden where we are establishing our new Global Hub.  

  

  



**Who are you?**  

Do you dream big? We do too, and we are excited to grow together. In this role, we believe it is the right mindset that will make a difference at VFS. If you bring a genuine interest in working with people in Transforming Together, along with a positive, service-oriented, and collaborative mindset, we welcome you to apply for this role. You take a proactive approach to your responsibilities and contribute ideas and recommendations to drive productivity and efficiency.

  

We believe the successful candidate has excellent knowledge of automotive financing, preferably within leasing and rental, combined with a strong level of ambition and the ability to understand both team and corporate objectives. They demonstrate superior verbal and interpersonal communication skills, along with the ability to handle confidential information and work with a high level of integrity and ethics. You have also proven experience in problem solving, research, and analysis.

**Qualifications and experience required to be successful in this role include:**

* Strong business analysis, problem solving, and decision-making capabilities
* Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent) in Information Technology Management or Computer Science
* Five-plus years of experience in Digital Technical Product development and Digital Product life cycle management (you build it, you run it)
* Five plus years of experience and in-depth knowledge of agile methodology, Scrum methods for digital product management, including testing approaches and technologies
* Experience and ability to identify, track, and manage dependencies within product roadmap and release plans, ensuring smooth delivery execution and timely delivery.
* Outstanding communications, presentation, leadership, and stakeholder management skills
* Ability to effectively manage the priorities and conflicting needs of stakeholders
* Experience and understanding of solution architecting, component development, Infrastructure monitoring and maintenance, user role management, and API development.
* User Interface (UI) and User Experience (UX) design experience
* Ability to have fun and a willingness to try new things and challenge the status quo.

 **What’s in it for you?**  

We offer a solid and competitive package of compensation and benefits, and you will enjoy a diverse working environment with a culture of care and inclusion. We invest in your personal development and growth to achieve your career aspirations. Volvo Financial Services is an on-site business, and being together enables us to strengthen our innovative and collaborative culture and support your continued success. We also understand that you may need occasional or temporary flexibility, which your leader is equipped to manage in a way that fits well with our culture.

 **Ready for the next move?**  

If you want to make a real impact on your career, Volvo Financial Services is where you want to be. We look forward to meeting you.

  

Last application day is 26th of June.


We value your data privacy and therefore do not accept applications via mail.

 **Who we are and what we believe in**  

We are committed to shaping the future landscape of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. Fulfilling our mission creates countless career opportunities for talents across the group’s leading brands and entities.

  

Applying to this job offers you the opportunity to join **Volvo Group**. Every day, you will be working with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to be able to leave our society in better shape for the next generation. We are passionate about what we do, and we thrive on teamwork. We are almost 100,000 people united around the world by a culture of care, inclusiveness, and empowerment.

  

At **Volvo Financial Services**, we are working together to shape the world we want to live in. As the captive finance arm of the Volvo Group, VFS provides financial services and solutions that meet the needs of our customers’ evolving business. Through our dedication to innovation, we support society in its adoption of sustainable transport and equipment solutions. VFS is headquartered inGothenburg, Sweden, and serves Volvo Group customers and dealers in more than 50 markets.
company_description: Every day, we work with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to leave our society in better shape for the next generation.

title: Software Engineering Analyst
description:
**Software, the fuel for mobility**  

  

We bring bold digital visions to life. So we’re on the lookout for more curious and creative engineers who want to create change – one line of high-quality code at a time. Our transformation isn't for everyone, but if you're excited about solving the leading-edge technological challenges facing the auto industry, then let’s talk about your next move.

**Let's introduce ourselves**
-----------------------------

  

Everything we do starts with people.  

  

Our human-centric focus is what makes us different from all other car companies, and it’s at the heart of everything we create. If you want to join us in our mission to make people’s  

lives less complicated, we offer you a chance to grow together with talented people who want to make a true difference.  

  

What’s in it for you?  

  

Safe Vehicle Automation (SVA), consist of around 600 skilled engineers who are responsible for everything from research and advanced engineering, to implementation, verification and validation of current and future customer offers in the area of Safety, Vehicle control and Autonomous Drive. Nested within SVA is the department of AD/ADAS Functions, we develop functions such as Collision Avoidance, Low Speed Assistance, Pilot Assist, connected safety and pave the way towards Autonomous Driving (AD) . We develop and integrate functionality and SW into a complete product, making use of sensor input such as radar, camera, ultrasonic and lidar, that build a comprehensive perception of the car’s surroundings.  

  

We are offering you the opportunity to be a part of a team where we learn every day, challenge each other, and give continuous feedback. Your long-term competence plan will include steps to expand your knowledge and contributions within many competence areas that are within your interest or needed in the team.

**What you'll do**
------------------

  

You will be part of the AD ADAS functions department, designing and support in verifying ADAS functions, where you will take the role as Test engineer within the team.
  

  

This means that you will perform vehicle and virtual testing of ADAS functions, work together with the other function design engineers and testers, creating the best ADAS customer functions on the market. You will develop test automation capabilities for the ADAS functions, and work with method development within system and function testing

**What you'll bring**
---------------------

  

**Do you fit the profile?**  

  

To be successful in the role you have a drive to learn continuously and are flexible to broaden your experience.

  

* You have a bachelors or Masters in Electrical Engineering, Automation and Control, Automotive or similar.
* You have experience in conducting test scenarios of Collision avoidance functions such as Autonomous Emergency Braking and such
* Working with the EUNCAP test protocol and its interpretation for .
* You have strong experience in system design, UX concepts, as well as strong experience in ISO262262 – Fusa concepts.
* Swedish Driving license B is a must!
* T2 or T3 is a very good add on to the profile
* Experience in customer function and system verification as well as experience in parking functionality is considered meritorious.
* Python scripting for log analysis.
* Flashing and fault tracing in the vehicle.
* Knowledge of the verification tool chain.

  


**Who are you?**

  

We are looking for a self-driven collaborator with high speed and who takes initiative! A person who is curious, innovative, and entrepreneurial. You care about the people around you, and get things done.  

  

You like technology and cars, but you like the way people and technology interact even more. You want technology to be easy and people oriented, and you want to make it happen. You love collaboration and are a team player with a test-driven development mindset.

 **Volvo Cars. For Life.**  

  

For nearly a century, Volvo Cars has empowered people to move freely in a personal, sustainable and safe way. Today, we are driving bold advancements in electrification, sustainability and automotive safety. To realise our ambitious vision, we are seeking innovative minds who are ready to tackle the challenges of tomorrow – today.
  

  

At Volvo Cars, we believe extraordinary things are achieved by ordinary people with a passion for making a difference. If you’re inspired by the opportunity to help redefine the future of mobility, we invite you to be part of our journey.  

  

**Ready to take the next step?**  

  

Submit your CV in English and tell us why you’re the ideal candidate for a role at Volvo Cars. Applications must be received no later than 27th of June 2026. You will receive a confirmation email after your submission.  

  

For questions regarding the recruitment process, please contact Recruiter Radoslaw Piela at radoslaw.piela@volvocars.com. For specific questions about the position, please reach out to Hiring Manager Shreyas Horantur Narasimha Murthy at SHREYAS.HORANTUR@VOLVOCARS.COM.

We welcome your application!

title: UX Lead at Zendr
description:
**About The Role**
 We're looking for a UX Lead to take ownership of our UX domain and help shape the next generation of our B2B freight platform. This is a hands-on leadership role - you'll work side by side with our UX Designers on end-to-end design, while setting direction, driving priorities and growing the team.
   

  

 As UX Lead at Zendr, you own both the day-to-day design work and the bigger UX vision for the product. You'll have the mandate to make key decisions within the domain, plan and prioritise the team's work against our strategic goals, and make sure our design drives a reliable, user-focused product. Developing a deep understanding of our product and business is central to the role - it's what lets you turn UX into real value for our customers.
   

  

 You'll work closely with the Head of Product, fellow domain leads and the wider Tech team in a fast-moving environment where collaboration, pragmatism and craft matter more than buzzwords. This is a role for someone who enjoys both leading and building - not just talking about design.
   

  

****Key responsibilities****
* Contribute hands-on to end-to-end design work alongside the UX team.
* Own the deliverables and the overall UX vision of the product.
* Set direction and make key decisions within the UX domain.
* Plan the team's work and proactively manage risks, dependencies and blockers.
* Keep UX priorities aligned with Zendr's overall strategic priorities.
* Drive and continuously improve the team's ways of working.
* Ensure the team has the right capacity and competencies, including leading hiring within the domain when needed.
* Mentor the UX team and support their growth.
* Collaborate cross-functionally, keep stakeholders aligned and flag challenges and risks to the Head of Product.


**About You**
 You're an experienced UX designer who's ready to take ownership of a domain and lead a team – without stepping away from the craft. You balance hands-on design work with setting direction, and you're comfortable making decisions and prioritising under shifting demands. You communicate clearly, turn messy discussions into clear outcomes, and you're motivated by helping both your team and your users succeed.
   

  

**We're Looking For Someone Who Has**
* At least 5 years of professional experience in UX/product design.
* At least 2 years in a lead or similar role, leading and mentoring designers.
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to communicate design decisions clearly and create alignment across teams and stakeholders.
* Experience driving end-to-end product design, from discovery and research to delivery and validation.
* Experience balancing user needs, business goals and technical constraints when shaping product decisions.
* Proficiency in Figma with structured file organization, versioning practices and scalable design systems.
* Curiosity about emerging technologies and experience in how AI can enhance design processes.
* Fluent in English, both spoken and written.


**High Value If You Also Bring**
* Experience designing B2B SaaS products in logistics or other operationally complex industries


**About Zendr**
 Zendr is a fast-growing SaaS company developing cloud-based solutions for B2B freight. We take pride in our innovative platform and the passionate team that contributes to our success every day. At Zendr, collaboration and well-being are key – we offer a workplace where you can truly make an impact. We're proud of what we do and of our commitment to making our customers' work easier. We believe it's important that you feel valued, engaged, and empowered to influence our journey. At Zendr, you can grow quickly – both professionally and personally – while being part of building something meaningful.
   

  

****What we offer****
* Direct impact on our core product – your work will shape the next generation of our B2B freight platform.
* High ownership and autonomy over the UX domain and its direction.
* A culture where ideas are welcomed and your input truly matters.
* Flexible working conditions.
* A competitive salary in the range of 60'–80' SEK per month, tailored to your background, skills and experience, along with a locally adapted benefits package designed to support your well-being and growth.


****Our hiring process****
 We respect your time and aim to make the recruitment journey fast, transparent and enjoyable:
   

  

* Application review - We'll review your application promptly and get back to you within a few days.
* First conversation - An informal video call to learn more about you and share who we are.
* Portfolio & case discussion - A walk-through of your work to understand your design thinking, decisions and how you lead.
* Final meeting - Meet the team, talk through the role in detail, and see if we're the right fit for each other.
* From first contact to final decision, you can expect clear communication, timely feedback, and respect for your time – because great talent deserves a great candidate experience.


****Additional information****
 We review applications on a rolling basis, which means the position may be filled before the closing date.
   

  

 Start date: As soon as possible.
   

  

 Scope: Full-time, permanent position.
   

  

 Location: Jönköping, Stockholm or Linköping.

title: UI/UX Designer
description:
**About Elite Prospects** 




  





 Elite Prospects is the world’s leading hockey platform and the central hub connecting fans, players, agents, scouts, and executives. As the true gateway to hockey, we create opportunities for players while serving as the global community destination for everything related to the game.
 



 With more than thirty thousand paying subscribers, over five hundred thousand registered members, and six million unique monthly visitors, Elite Prospects continues to cement its role as the digital heartbeat of hockey. We are now looking for a UI UX Designer who wants to help shape the future of hockey technology.
 



  





  





**The Role** 




  





 As a UI UX Designer at Elite Prospects, you will own the design value chain for your team. You will lead everything from user research and understanding briefs to concept development, sketching, and handover to developers.
 



 This role requires more than designing within existing constraints. You will need to immerse yourself in the full customer journey, identify opportunities, and propose new ways of packaging or rethinking solutions to achieve the best possible user experience. Your ability to understand users, data, and the complexity of the product will be central to your daily work.
 



 You will work independently as the sole designer in a cross functional team together with product manager and developers. At the same time, you will have access to senior designers who can provide feedback and act as a sounding board for ideas.
 



  





  





**Who You Are** 




  





 Requirements
 



  




* University degree in engineering or a similar relevant field
* Minimum five years of experience working in UI UX across the full process from ideation to implementation and iteration
* Experience working with complex digital products - both web & app - catering to several different user groups
* Experience in data visualization is a strong plus
* Fluency in both Swedish and English
* Strong interest in and knowledge of hockey
* Confident in your professional role and comfortable working independently in cross functional teams



  





 Personal qualities
 



  




* Engaged and passionate about design and product development
* Action oriented with the ability to turn abstract ideas into concrete concepts and designs that create value
* Curious about new tools and ways of working, and comfortable experimenting with AI to improve your design workflow



  





**Team and Workplace** 




 You will join our Product and Tech team based at our main office in central Stockholm. We also have a tech office in Malmö as well as team members working remotely across Europe, North America, and Thailand.
 



  





  





**What We Offer** 




  




* The opportunity to work on a very exciting, fast growing product that we are fully committed to
* A talented, friendly team that values collaboration and truly enjoys working together
* A culture that includes
* An annual company conference bringing together colleagues from across three continents
* Monthly learning sessions focused on personal and professional development
* Frequent after work activities and fun office games



  





 If you want to help build the future of hockey technology and work with a team that plays to win together, Elite Prospects is ready to welcome you onto the ice.

title: Creative Designer
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger—and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal in 2018—and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco—we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management—and change lives along the way.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Creative Designer at Air Apps, you will play a crucial role in shaping our brand identity and delivering visually engaging designs across multiple platforms. You will collaborate with various teams to ensure a cohesive and compelling user experience, working on digital ads, social media content, landing pages, email campaigns, and print materials.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain a consistent visual identity that aligns with Air Apps’ brand guidelines.
* Create engaging graphics, illustrations, infographics, and layouts for web, social media, email campaigns, and print materials.
* Collaborate with Marketing, Product, and Content teams to translate requirements into compelling visual solutions.
* Iterate on designs based on feedback from stakeholders and refine assets using user insights and performance metrics.
* Ensure high-quality output and conduct design quality assurance across various channels.
* Utilize industry-standard design software (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite, Figma) to create and deliver assets in multiple formats.


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Fine Arts, or a related field.
* Around 3 years of experience creating assets for digital marketing campaigns, social media, and web.
* Strong portfolio showcasing a range of design projects and styles.
* Knowledge of typography, color theory, layout, and design best practices.
* Proficiency in industry-standard design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and Figma.
* Strong communication, time-management, and attention-to-detail skills.
* Ability to work in a fast-paced, remote environment and collaborate effectively across teams.


**What benefits are we offering?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.
   

  

 Compensation Range: €44K - €55K

title: Lead UX Designer
description:
**Job description** 




 We are looking for a Lead UX Designer to join Recharge’s Tech organisation, reporting to the CPTO. In this role, you will work closely across the company to shape clear, reliable and user‑centred experiences – both for our end customers and for colleagues using our internal tools.
 



 Recharge is on a journey to create the charging industry’s best customer experience. A key part of this journey is unifying the end‑to‑end experience across digital services, internal operations and physical charging sites into one cohesive, intuitive and seamless whole. This role plays a central part in that transformation – building new products and services while thoughtfully improving what already exists.
 



 Recharge is a small and fast‑moving company where decisions are typically made close to the problem. You will have real influence, a broad scope, and the opportunity to shape both the experiences we deliver and how we work together as a company.
 



  





**Key responsibilities** 




 This is a cross‑functional role focused on shaping how Recharge’s products and services work in real‑world use across apps, internal tools and charging sites - and bringing these elements together into one coherent, reliable experience.
 



 You will work closely with Product and Engineering throughout development, while collaborating with teams such as Operations, Revenue, Customer Service and Site Partners to ensure that customer insight, operational reality and business goals are reflected in the user experience. You’ll be part of an environment where AI and automation are actively explored to solve real user problems - from smarter internal tools to better decision support and insights.
 



  





**Drive discovery & insight** 



* Lead discovery across customer and internal user journeys, combining qualitative research, quantitative insight and hands‑on exploration of real‑world use cases.
* Identify where experiences break down across systems, processes and touchpoints – and translate these insights into clear, actionable design opportunities.
* Build a strong understanding of operational workflows, constraints and dependencies so solutions work in practice, not just in theory.



  





**UX design across complex user experiences** 



* Design user flows, interactions, prototypes and interfaces across customer‑facing products, partner experiences and internal tools.
* Take ideas from early concepts through to delivery using modern UX methods and tools, with a strong focus on clarity, accessibility and usability.
* Shape experiences that connect digital services and physical touchpoints, creating consistency across apps, services and the on‑site charging journey.
* Help define UX patterns, principles and frameworks that scale across teams and support a more coherent end‑to‑end experience.



  





**Shape end‑to‑end experiences** 



* Take an active role in shaping how the full Recharge experience comes together – from digital journeys to the physical charging environment – so users experience one connected and intuitive service.
* Balance strategic thinking with practical design work, helping teams make good decisions throughout the development process.



  





**Collaborate and influence across the organisation** 



* Work closely with teams across Recharge to bring together customer insight, operational reality, business goals and technical possibilities.
* Bring clarity to complex decisions by using strong UX rationale, structured thinking and best practices to align diverse stakeholders.
* Contribute to a culture where design has real influence, with the freedom to shape better ways of working, strengthen UX maturity and raise the quality of what we deliver.



  





**Success factors** 



* Senior‑level experience (around 5+ years) in UX design
* Experience designing for both external users and internal tools or workflows
* Ability to take ownership of UX from discovery to delivery, while collaborating closely with others
* Comfort working in technically constrained, system‑heavy environments
* Strong skills in interaction design, information architecture, prototyping and systems thinking
* Experience collaborating closely with engineers and product managers
* Confidence communicating UX decisions in technical, operational and product contexts
* A pragmatic mindset, focused on real impact rather than visual polish alone
* Experience with products or services that combine digital interfaces and physical environments (e.g. on‑site services, hardware‑adjacent products or operational systems)



  





 We believe that the right candidate has a genuine interest in the green shift, and is either already driving an EV or is very interested in doing so in the near future.
 



  





**What can we offer?** 




 We offer you a role within a team advancing sustainable transportation and creating a greener future. Your work will have a direct impact on shaping the electric vehicle future. Our core values are Care, Share and Dare where we focus on building a better future in a rapidly growing business, together.
 



  




* Subsidized EV-charging
* Flexible working hours and hybrid office
* Development opportunities and career opportunities
* An inclusive working environment in a Nordic company
* Very good pension and insurance schemes
* Health Insurance
* Modern and central location in Moss / Oslo / Stockholm



  





**Interested?** 




 Do you want to start an exciting and meaningful journey with Recharge and have a lot of fun on the way? Please apply before July 31. Interviews will be conducted continuously and the position may be filled before end of application period.
 



 Recharge values diversity. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
 



  





**Place of work:** 
 at our HQ in Moss, office in central Oslo or our office in central Stockholm. Some traveling will be required, primarily within the Nordic region. This role reports to the Chief Product & Technology Officer .
 



  





**Application deadline:** 
 Please apply no later than 31-07-2026. Position open until filled. Please apply by uploading your CV and application letter through our recruitment system Nuu.
 



 Questions about the position can be directed to: Ulf Bragnell, Chief Product & Technology Officer: Ulf.Bragnell@rechargeinfra.com or through our recruitment system Nuu.
 



  





*We do background checks on relevant candidate via our partner Semac AS.*

title: Designer (Digital Experience & DTC) - Barebells
description:
*At* 
***Vitamin Well Group,***
*we provide great-tasting drinks, snacks, and protein products. Our brands Vitamin Well, NOCCO, and Barebells are available across most of Europe, North America, the MENA region, and parts of Asia Pacific. With a revenue of 650 million euros, we operate in over 40 markets, with headquarters in Stockholm and offices in fourteen countries around the world.*
**About The Role**
 As
 **Designer (Digital Experience & DTC)** 
 , you will design and elevate the customer journey for
 **Barebells** 
 across our digital ecosystem. You will work across DTC websites, marketplaces such as Amazon, and CRM touchpoints, ensuring that every interaction is intuitive, engaging, and aligned with the brand.
   

  

 You will translate brand strategy into high-performing digital experiences, combining strong design craft with a structured, data-informed approach. Working closely with e-commerce, growth, CRM, and brand teams, you will identify opportunities to improve the customer journey and continuously refine how our digital channels perform.
   

  

 You will play a key role in ensuring consistency and quality across all digital touchpoints, while contributing to improvements in conversion, retention, and overall user experience through thoughtful and well-executed design.
   

  

 This role is based at our headquarters in Stockholm and reports to the Global Brand Manager Barebells.
   

  

 In short, you will:
   

  

* Design end-to-end customer journeys across DTC, marketplaces, and CRM channels
* Translate brand strategy into consistent and engaging digital experiences across markets
* Apply UX and UI best practices to improve usability, clarity, and flow
* Use data, insights, and testing to inform design decisions and iterate on solutions
* Contribute to improving conversion, retention, and overall customer experience through design
* Leverage AI tools to support workflows, exploration, and personalisation
* Collaborate closely with e-commerce, growth, CRM, and brand teams


 What you can expect
   

  

* Real impact on how our DTC and marketplace experiences perform
* Short decision paths and the ability to test and implement quickly
* Close work with growth, e-commerce, and brand teams across markets
* A high pace where ideas are tested, not parked
* The opportunity to push how AI is used within design and customer experience


 Who are you
   

  

 You are a designer with a strong foundation in UX and UI, and a clear interest in how digital experiences perform. You care about both how things look and how they work, and you are comfortable using data and insights to inform your decisions.
   

  

 You enjoy working across the full customer journey and collaborating with different functions, bringing a structured and thoughtful approach to improving digital experiences over time.
   

  

**Essential Skills To Succeed**
* Minimum of 6 years’ experience in UX/UI design within DTC, e-commerce, or other conversion-driven digital environments
* Strong understanding of UX, UI, and customer journey design
* Ability to use data, insights, and testing to inform and improve design decisions
* Experience working with modern design tools and workflows
* Familiarity with AI tools within design processes
* Ability to collaborate across teams and stakeholders
* Experience working across multiple markets or brands is an advantage


 Apply by June 28th 2026.
   

  

**We review applications continuously and may close the role early.
   

  

 Please include your CV and portfolio — we want to see what you have built and how you think.**
**Life at Vitamin Well Group**
 Our growing family is made up of over 600 employees, representing a variety of cultures, experiences and diverse backgrounds. This diversity is a great asset as we continue our expansion and evolve our portfolio. At the same time, Vitamin Well is still very much a Swedish company, promoting Swedish values when it comes to both business and people. We treat each other in a fair and equal way, and we respect one another based on our qualities. As we expand Vitamin Well Group’s business, we are also committed to minimizing our environmental impact and continuously strive to lower emissions from for example production, logistics, and packaging.
   

  

 Working at Vitamin Well, we provide a dynamic environment defined by ambition, dedication, and an entrepreneurial spirit. In our action-oriented culture, the ability to make swift decisions is paramount in bringing ideas to fruition. We are committed to fostering an atmosphere where every individual's unique strengths contribute to our collective success. As a health and exercise-oriented company, we inspire an active lifestyle by partnering with top-performing athletes, but we also promote and support exercise among our employees.
   

  

*As part of the recruitment process, we may ask you to conduct a personality test as well as a test that measures logical ability. The purpose of the tests is to evaluate candidates as objective as possible and identify the best possible match for the role. The tests are based on solid research and are taken through our partner Alva Labs.*

title: Senior Designer, Digital Product (Mobile)
description:
Design
   

  

 Permanent
   

  

**Job Description**
**Turn ideas into reality. Globally.**
**At Electrolux we have a greater purpose than launching the latest product or technology. We want to improve the everyday lives of millions in a sustainable way. But to keep doing so, we need more people who want to innovate and re-imagine what life at home can be.**
 We are looking for a senior designer with a focus on digital product design to join our Taste team, where we create connected experiences for smart kitchen appliances. In this role, you will work cross-functionally with designers, developers, researchers, and product managers to drive user-centred design and deliver high-quality connected experiences for users around the world.
   

  

 Historically, the appliance industry has been all about hardware. In this role, you will help shape the future of the smart kitchen by combining software and hardware to create meaningful, data-driven experiences for consumers worldwide.
   

  

 We employ great people from a wide variety of backgrounds because we believe that diverse perspectives make our business stronger and more innovative. If you share our values, come find your place in our global community.
   

  

 Meet us on @lifeatelectrolux and career.electroluxgroup.com to learn more.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design for the end-to-end cooking experience across touchpoints, with a primary focus on the mobile app experience and how it connects with the appliance UI, voice, and other connected interfaces.
* Design software products from concept to implementation, including high-quality mobile UX, with attention to hierarchy, accessibility, layout, and navigation.
* Use data, insights, and research to inform design decisions and continuously improve the user experience across touchpoints.
* Bring concepts to life with low- and high-fidelity prototypes (and know when a simple sketch will suffice).
* Drive collaboration across the design process and broader organization by leading co-creation sessions, workshops, and structured design reviews, building alignment, shared ownership, and effective decision-making across cross-functional teams.
* Work with and evolve the Electrolux Group design system and pattern library.
* Build strong relationships with designers of different disciplines across the global Electrolux organization.


**You**
* Are passionate about food culture and designing connected kitchen experiences
* Collaborate effectively across functions (product, tech, marketing, business, operations, design)
* Communicate openly, build trust, and approach collaboration with humility
* Clearly articulate your design decisions to both technical and non-technical audiences
* Have a strong eye for detail and create intuitive, accessible, and visually refined interfaces
* Have experience working with UX writers or content designers
* Thrive in an iterative design process and actively seek feedback and critique
* Use empathy, logic, and data (quantitative and qualitative) to inform decisions
* Take ownership, drive initiatives forward, and challenge the status quo
* Care about sustainability and its role in design
* Are comfortable navigating ambiguity and change


**Required**
* 5+ years of experience with end-to-end consumer product design of mobile apps.
* Experience with, or interest in, designing voice-first user experiences.
* Expert understanding of iOS and Android design guidelines and UX principles.
* Excellent command of standard design applications such as Figma.
* Good knowledge of how to use AI to improve processes and outcomes.
* Good spoken and written English.
* Include in the application an online portfolio or PDF showcasing a range of your work.


**Where you'll be:**
 You will be based at our modern Global Headquarters in Stockholm, where more than 1,200 colleagues come together to collaborate and innovate. We operate in a hybrid work model, offering up to 20% remote flexibility, while maintaining a strong in-office presence to foster creativity, connection, and teamwork.
   

  

**Benefits highlights:**
* Stability of employment in a company that shapes living for the better for over 100 years
* Attractive additional benefits, such as free access to sports facilities, employee discounts, team and company events, onsite cafeteria
* Extensive learning opportunities and flexible career paths


 As part of Electrolux, we will continuously invest in you and your development. There are no barriers to where your career could take you.

title: Data Architects and Scientists -2026
description:
SEKROND AB provides services in the form of Technology Consulting and Outsourcing, Management Consulting, Product development and other similar activities in ICT, Telecommunications, Financial, Renewable/Non-renewable Energy spheres as well as Sales, marketing and maintenance of ICT software and hardware to clients.
  
  

We are hiring energetic and solution driven candidates for the following positions:
  
Data Scientists/Data Engineers
  
Data Architects/Designers
  
  

Qualifications and Expertise Desired
  
Data Scientists/Data Engineers
  
Bachelor or Master Degree in IT, EE, Computer Science, Software Engineering or relevant education or work experience.
  
Good communication skills in English.
  
Team player.

title: Systemhandläggare - Malmö Lär
description:
Publicerad: 16 juni 2026
Nu har du chansen att vara med från start i utvecklingen av Malmö stads nya, stadsgemensamma funktion för samordning, stöd och support för Malmö Lär.



Malmö Lär är Malmö stads stadsgemensamma lärplattform som samlar utbildningar och intern kompetensutveckling i ett och samma system – ett så kallat Learning Management System (LMS). Syftet med Malmö Lär är att underlätta, tillgängliggöra, systematisera och effektivisera kompetensutveckling och lärande inom Malmö stads organisation.

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------



Som systemhandläggare för Malmö Lär kommer du tillsammans med två kollegor att utgöra första linjens support för stadens medarbetare och chefer och bidra till att skapa en likvärdig, tillgänglig och användarvänlig upplevelse av Malmö Lär i hela organisationen.



Rollen kombinerar användarstöd, administration och utveckling av arbetssätt. En central del av uppdraget innebär att ge stöd till användare i deras dagliga arbete i Malmö Lär. Du hjälper medarbetare och chefer att navigera i systemet, besvarar frågor och vägleder i olika funktioner och arbetssätt. Användarna når Malmö Lär-supporten via telefon och HR-services ärendehanteringssystem.



Utöver supportarbetet arbetar du med administrativa uppgifter kopplade till Malmö Lär. Du bidrar till att göra systemet lätt att använda genom att utveckla användarstöd, manualer, checklistor och annat stödmaterial till olika målgrupper. I uppdraget kan även ingå att producera kortare instruktionsfilmer och annat digitalt informations- eller utbildningsmaterial som underlättar användningen av systemet.



Rollen passar dig som motiveras av att göra digitala system begripliga och användarvänliga. Uppdraget är konsultativt och du förväntas inte alltid ha svaret direkt, men du tar ansvar för att utreda frågor, hitta lösningar och återkoppla till användarna ett tydligt och professionellt sätt.



Som systemhandläggare samarbetar du nära de utbildningssamordnare och systemförvaltare HR-service som också arbetar med fokus Malmö Lär.



För att ge dig goda förutsättningar i rollen får du som en del av introduktionen en fördjupad utbildning i Totara via Malmö stads systemleverantör Aleido. Totara är den plattform som inom Malmö stad benämns Malmö Lär.


**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------



Vi söker dig som trivs i en serviceinriktad roll och som motiveras av möjligheten att vara med och bygga upp en ny funktion samt utveckla nya arbetssätt. Arbetet innebär daglig kontakt med medarbetare och chefer i Malmö stads organisation, vilket ställer höga krav serviceförmåga, tydlig kommunikation och ett lösningsorienterat arbetssätt.



Du har en god pedagogisk och kommunikativ förmåga och kan ett tydligt och användarvänligt sätt förklara system, funktioner och arbetssätt för olika målgrupper. Du arbetar strukturerat och har förmåga att självständigt planera, prioritera och följa upp flera parallella arbetsuppgifter. För att lyckas i rollen behöver du ha lätt för att samarbeta och en vilja att bidra aktivt till utvecklingen av gemensamma arbetssätt kopplade till Malmö Lär.



Vi söker dig som har:


* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT, systemvetenskap, pedagogik, digitalt lärande eller annan utbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer som relevant.
* Mycket god digital förmåga och erfarenhet av att ge användarstöd/support i IT-system där du har väglett och stöttat användare via telefon och digitala kanaler. Erfarenheten kan ha förvärvats genom arbete som exempelvis IT-pedagog, IT-administratör, IT-support eller i annan liknande roll.
* Erfarenhet av utveckling av användarstöd, instruktioner, manualer, guider eller annat informationsmaterial riktat till användare av digitala system.

God förmåga att kommunicera* svenska i tal och skrift.


Det är meriterande om du även har:


* Erfarenhet av arbete i Learning Management System (LMS)
* Erfarenhet av arbete i ärendehanteringssystem.
* Erfarenhet av att producera digitalt utbildnings- eller informationsmaterial, exempelvis instruktionsfilmer, e-utbildningar eller interaktiva guider.
* Erfarenhet av arbete som super-user, systemadministratör eller annan roll med särskilt ansvar för användarstöd och systemrelaterade frågor.

**Om arbetsplatsen**
--------------------



HR-service är Malmö stads centraliserade verksamhet inom HR och utgör en del av den gemensamma HR-funktionen inom Malmö stad. Verksamheten är organiserad i fyra sektioner; Lön & Pension, Lärande & Support, Systemförvaltning & Behörigheter samt Internkonsulter. Du kommer att tillhöra sektionen Internkonsulter där du ingår i ett kompetent och dedikerat specialistteam. Totalt består sektionen av cirka 12 medarbetare som arbetar med breda uppdrag inom HR och kommunikationsområdet. Tillsammans arbetar vi i en fartfylld miljö med intressanta och varierande stadsövergripande uppdrag.



HR-service är en del av avdelningen Kommuntjänster vid Serviceförvaltningen. Kommuntjänster har drygt 600 anställda inom sex olika verksamhetsområden med uppdraget är att tillhandahålla kvalitativa, hållbara och kostnadseffektiva tjänster till Malmö stads förvaltningar och till Malmöborna.



Här kan du läsa om Malmö stads organisation och stadens samtliga förvaltningar.



Här kan du även läsa om Malmö stad som arbetsgivare.



Malmö stads verksamheter är organiserade i 14 förvaltningar. Vårt gemensamma uppdrag är att skapa välfärd och hållbar samhällsutveckling. Tillsammans med Malmöborna utvecklar vi en ännu bättre stad att bo, verka och vara i; olikheter, livserfarenheter och talanger gör Malmö till en smart stad i hjärtat av Europa. Världens kunskap finns här.


**Information om tjänsten**
---------------------------



Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning  

Omfattning: Heltid  

Antal tjänster: 1  

Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse


**Övrigt**
----------


**Som kandidat rekommenderas du att kontrollera din skräppost under ansökningstiden, för att säkerställa att du inte missar svarsmejl från Malmö stad.**


**Observera att vi i Malmö stad tagit bort det personliga brevet från ansökningsprocessen och ersatt det med urvalsfrågor, detta för en mer inkluderande rekryteringsprocess och en effektiv kandidatupplevelse för dig som söker jobb hos oss. Dina svar blir en viktig del i vårt urvalsarbete.**



Malmö stad strävar efter att medarbetarna ska representera den mångfald som finns i vår stad. Vi välkomnar därför sökande som kan bidra till att vi som arbetsgivare kan uppfylla Malmöbornas behov.


**Om tjänsten**
---------------


Ansök senast
4 juli 2026
Anställningsform
Tillsvidareanställning
Omfattning
Heltid
Referensnummer
20261477
**Kontakt**
-----------


*Hanna Wendel Diamantoudis**Enhetschef HR-service**0733667587**hanna.w.diamantoudis@malmo.se**Malin Karaca**Facklig kontaktperson – Vision**0709619779**malin.karaca@malmo.se**Lars Kristiensson**Facklig kontaktperson – SACO**0708123687**lars.kristensson@malmo.se*

----------------------------

title: Teamledande systemförvaltare
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Products & Systems Engineering
* ID 503525-en\_US
**Teamledande systemförvaltare**
--------------------------------


Vill du kombinera operativt arbete med ledarskap i en samhällsviktig miljö? Vi söker nu en Teamlead som vill ta en nyckelroll i ett team som arbetar med förvaltning och vidareutveckling av verksamhetssystem. I rollen får du både bidra hands-on i det dagliga arbetet och samtidigt leda, fördela och följa upp teamets leverans i nära dialog med kunden.


**Om rollen**


Som Teamlead arbetar du operativt i uppdraget med liknande arbetsuppgifter som övriga konsulter i teamet, samtidigt som du fungerar som teamets huvudperson och naturliga kontaktpunkt gentemot kunden. Du ansvarar för att skapa struktur i vardagen, säkerställa rätt bemanning och bidra till ett effektivt samarbete mellan teamet och kundens verksamhet.


**Dina ansvarsområden**


* Planera, samordna och fördela arbetet inom teamet.
* Säkerställa att bemanningen är fulltalig och jämnt fördelad över arbetsveckan.
* Vara kontaktpunkt gentemot kunden i det dagliga samarbetet.
* Arbeta operativt med löpande systemförvaltning, ärendehantering och felavhjälpning.
* Driva och stötta planerade förändringar som genomförs sprintbaserat.
* Utföra och kvalitetssäkra konfiguration, testning och införande av nya funktioner och moduler.
* Bidra till utveckling av processer, tekniska ramverk och automatisering inom förvaltningsarbetet.
* Stödja juniora kollegor och skapa goda förutsättningar för teamets utveckling och leveransförmåga.

**Vi söker dig som**


* Har arbetat minst 4 år med systemutveckling och/eller systemförvaltning
* Har erfarenhet av att leda en mindre grupp eller ta ansvar för ett delområde eller team.
* Arbetar självständigt, strukturerat och med hög ansvarskänsla.
* Är kommunikativ, samarbetsorienterad och trygg i dialog med både kollegor och kund.
* Trivs i en roll där du kombinerar operativ leverans med koordinering och ledning.

**Meriterande erfarenheter**


* Integration av system i samband med verksamhetsutveckling och digitalisering.
* Utveckling, anpassning och införande av RPA-lösningar.
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt och ramverk, exempelvis Scrum, DevOps eller ITIL.
* Erfarenhet av incidenthantering, avvikelseuppföljning och andra oplanerade driftstörningar.
* Systematisk planering, dokumentation och genomförande av konfigurations- och förvaltningsarbete.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med automatisering, exempelvis konfigurationsscript, deploy-pipelines eller automatiserad dokumentation.

**Praktisk information**


Arbetet utförs vardagar mellan 08:00 och 17:00 på plats hos kund. Vid incidenter eller större systemuppgraderingar kan arbete på kvällar och helger förekomma, vilket planeras i god tid i dialog med berörda parter.

title: ECU Software Engineer
description:

**Required Skills**
