title: Data Engineer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.


We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a **Data Engineer** in our **Stockholm office** – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?


### **The role**


The Ad Platform Solutions team sits within Viaplay Digital Ad Product, bridging commercial priorities and technical delivery in Viaplay. You will be joining a small, growing team where your work connects directly to how the sales organisation operates every day.


As our new Data Engineer, you will play a central role in developing and improving the data infrastructure that powers ad sales across all Viaplay markets. We’ve built a solid foundation that supports our operations today, and we’re now looking for someone to take ownership of it - improving and strengthening what’s already in place, while also influencing architecture and shaping how the platform evolves.


This is a hands-on engineering role. In a small team, you will work across the full data lifecycle - from pipeline development and orchestration to data modelling, ensuring the right data reaches the right people. Your day-to-day will include:  

  



* Building and maintaining data pipelines that power ad sales reporting and operations across Sweden, Norway, and Denmark


* Structuring and modelling data so it is clean, consistent, and genuinely useful to the business


* Identifying and resolving issues in existing pipelines, reducing manual work and improving reliability


* Translating needs from stakeholders into solid technical solutions


* Contributing to architectural decisions as the platform evolves

We actively use AI-assisted tools as part of our development workflow to improve efficiency and speed up delivery. We expect engineers to use these tools effectively, while critically evaluating outputs and maintaining full ownership of the systems they build.


### **What we’re looking for**


We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:


* Solid, production-level data engineering experience - you have done this before and know what good looks like


* Strong skills in Python and/or C#, with confident SQL and hands-on database experience, relational databases such as SQL Server and PostgreSQL.


* Experience working with cloud-based data platforms, particularly in Azure environments.


* Experience building and maintaining data pipelines using orchestration tools (such as Airflow or Meltano), along with a solid understanding of data warehouse principles (e.g. dimensional modelling, data quality, and performance optimisation)


* Experience using AI-assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot, Claude) in a development workflow


* Comfortable working autonomously in a small team, with a strong sense of ownership and the ability to drive work forward without much hand-holding

**It’s a bonus if you have:**


* Experience with ad sales, digital advertising data, or media industry systems


* A can-do attitude, sense of humor and the ability to work humbly with others.

### **What we offer you**


**We’ve got you covered! 30 days** of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
  

  

**Your wellbeing matters.** We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
  

  

**A safe space to grow and up-skill.** Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.  

  

**Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do** . So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including series & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.  

  



### **Hit play today**


If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
  

  

Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: Internal Engagement Specialist
description:
**Company Overview**
 Metrea delivers effects-as-a-service to national security partners across five domains and more than a dozen mission areas. These include airborne ISR, electronic warfare, secure communications, aerial refuelling, special air missions, aerial firefighting, and advanced simulation. We own the whole stack: designing, building, and operating turnkey capabilities that give our partners decisive, asymmetric advantage against rapidly evolving threats.
   

  

 Our operating model is built around three interlocking pillars. The Support Groups provide a global shared-service – spanning people, finance, platform, operations, legal, and engagement. This frees up our Core Groups, who develop and own mission capabilities end-to-end, to focus entirely on delivery. The Market Groups apply a regional lens, ensuring that our agile and adaptable capabilities remain aligned to the wicked problems that matter most to our partners across the Americas, EMEA, and Asia-Pacific.
   

  

 At the heart of our model is a simple but powerful idea: be a true partner with skin in the game. Our partners need effects, not just equipment. By owning the full stack – from the lab to the field – we are able to drive a continuous cycle of innovation that keeps our partners ahead. It's a fast-moving, intellectually demanding environment where talented people are given real responsibility, work on problems that matter, and contribute to an enterprise that is growing quickly and deliberately.
   

  

 Headquartered in Washington, DC, with facilities across the United States, the United Kingdom, as well as Continental Europe and Asia-Pacific.
   

  

**Group Overview**
 The Engagement Group provides high-level guidance and support to ensure the Enterprise engages – both internally and externally – in a clear, targeted and consistent manner. By managing the frameworks, toolkits, templates, systems and processes and supporting delivery and execution, the group enables the Enterprise to effectively map, network, collect, shape and execute events. It also ensures that Metrea’s messaging remains current, its tone aligned, and its brand represented consistently across all touchpoints. The Group also oversees corporate memberships, manages Enterprises’s network, and develops branded assets that accurately reflect Metrea’s identity.
   

  

**Position Summary**
 As part of the Internal Engagement team, you will play a pivotal role in the successful execution of collaborative unity between the core and support groups in the Enterprise. As an Internal Engagement Specialist, you will be responsible for overseeing the day-to-day operations of physical and virtual workspaces, including facilities, vendor relationships, and space planning. This also includes supporting onboarding of new Teammates, coordinating internal events such as office celebrations, team summits, and deep-dive sessions to foster employee engagement and team cohesion. This role requires excellent communication skills, a proactive approach to problem-solving and a high degree of professionalism.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Oversee the maintenance of a clean, well-organised and resourced working environment, ensuring adequate inventory of office supplies and equipment, and manage relationships with external vendors to maintain operational efficiency.
* Support the framework planning, coordination and delivery of internal events and team meetings to foster Teammate engagement.
* In coordination with the People Team, provide Onboarding Buddy support to ensure that new teammates are effectively integrated into the Metrea Ecosystem of frameworks and FIRMWARE.
* Support the management of inventory, distribution, and logistics of branded workwear and merchandise to support internal cohesion, events, and brand representation.
* Support the development of and oversee the annual office budget, track expenditure with accuracy using internal reporting mechanisms, and ensure the efficient and cost-effective allocation of resources.
* Work with the Head of Team Engagement to identify inefficiencies in existing processes, communicate effectively procedural changes and support strategies to streamline operations and enhance productivity.
* Assist in the development and execution of Enterprise expansion initiatives, including workforce growth and office location planning.


**What You Bring**
* Able to effectively prioritise tasks, manage competing deadlines, and remain agile in responding to rapidly changing requirements.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact effectively with teammates at all levels of the organisation.
* Proficient with MS Office and fluent in the use of modern software tools and applications.
* Strong organisational and time management abilities, with a keen attention to detail and the ability to prioritise tasks effectively.
* Practical experience in an administrative coordination role.
* Experience in facilities management.


**Benefits**
* Friskvård of 5K annually
* Parental leave
* 5% occupational pension (swe. tjänstepension),
* 30 days of leave
* Bonus Scheme
* Personal development opportunities


**Work Authorization / Security Clearance**
 The employee will have the legal right to work in Sweden and will be able to produce right to work documentation
   

  

**AAP/EEO Statement**
 Metrea Management Limited (MAM) is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or other characteristics protected by law.
   

  

**Position Type and Expected Hours of Work**
 This is a full-time non-exempt position with typical working hours of Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. Hours and work shifts may change in accordance with department and business needs. Exempt Employees must have the ability to be on-call and available, as business needs require. Non-Exempt employees may be required to work over 40 hours per week with approval from the department manager.
   

  

**Work Environment**
 This job operates in an office setting.
   

  

**Travel**
 Some national and international travel may be necessary as part of this role.
   

  

**Our Firmware**
 At Metrea, our single core value is Rooted in Humility, and our four cornerstone attributes are Entrepreneurial, Systematic, Discerning, and Over-Deliver. These form what we call our Teammate Firmware. Just like technical firmware connects software and hardware, our Firmware is the constant interface between our mission and our people. It defines how we show up, how we work together, and how we solve complex problems.
   

  

 Our team Firmware creates a web-like, hyper-collaborative, dynamically hierarchical way of working that helps us adapt quickly, communicate openly, and distribute decision-making to where expertise actually lives. It enables groups to self-organize around hard problems, shift fluidly as priorities evolve, and operate with the trust, curiosity, and discipline required in a complex mission space. This foundation allows us to deliver elegant, effective solutions and uphold our purpose: protecting our precious inheritance.

title: Information Technology Support Specialist
description:
Position: IT Support Technician L1 (On-site)
 



 Role Type: FTE
 



 Working Days: 5 Days a week
 



 Contract duration: 1 year (extendable)
 



 Contract Type: Freelance / B2B contract
 



 Experience Required: More than 3 years IT Support.
 



 Site Address: Stockholm,Sweden
 



 Role – Onsite Deskside Support (L1/L2) Key Responsibilities:
 



 Key Responsibilities:
 



 1. Provided end-to-end technical support for desktop and laptop systems, including troubleshooting hardware, software, and connectivity issues.
 



 2. Handled IMAC activities (Install, Move, Add, Change) and break/fix tasks for end-user devices.
 



 3. Managed the full lifecycle of desktop devices, including configuration, patching, OS imaging, and vendor-based hardware replacements.
 



 4. Delivered support using tools such as SCCM, Intune, and ServiceNow for asset tracking, ticket resolution, and remote assistance.
 



 5. Administered approved software installations, updates, and security patching in coordination with IT policies.
 



 6. Provided remote and deskside support using EUC tools and supported applications such as MS Office, Outlook, and VPN clients.
 



 7. Ensured compliance with security protocols, antivirus monitoring, and desktop policy enforcement.
 



 8. Offered VIP support and acted as the primary onsite contact during critical escalations or outages.
 



 9. Supported printers, scanners, and peripheral devices, including troubleshooting and routine maintenance.
 



 10. Assisted with Active Directory tasks, basic user account management, and smart hands support. 11. Maintained documentation of incident resolution, hardware inventory, and technical guides for internal reference.
 



 12. Demonstrated familiarity with Windows OS environments, mobile device support, and basic MAC device handling.
 



 13. Followed ITIL practices for incident, problem, and service request management in corporate environments.

title: System Architect 3 Months Contract
description:
Belmont Lavan Ltd is looking for an experienced
 **System Architect** 
 to join our team on a 3-month contract basis. In this role, you will be responsible for designing and overseeing the architecture of complex systems to meet business requirements and ensure scalability, security, and performance.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Develop and document system architecture designs that align with business and technical needs
* Collaborate with stakeholders including developers, product managers, and operations teams to ensure unified vision and execution
* Support core banking technology transformation initiatives, ensuring robust and compliant architectures
* Provide coaching and guidance on key architectural principles, non-functional requirements, and best practices
* Contribute to architectural documentation such as System Design Documents (SDD) and Test Readiness Review Documents (TRRD)
* Assess and recommend improvements in IT infrastructure and platform capabilities


**Requirements**
**Requirements:**
* Proven experience as a System Architect, preferably within the banking or financial services sector
* Strong knowledge of core banking systems and related architecture
* Experience with integration architectures including message queuing technologies such as IBM MQ and Kafka
* Familiarity with IBM Mainframe environments and transition strategies to midrange platforms is a plus
* Knowledge of Temenos T24/Transact platform is advantageous
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
* Understanding of Agile methodologies and experience working in Agile teams
* Ability to define and manage non-functional requirements and support root cause analysis


**Benefits**
* Flexible working arrangements (Hybrid/Remote depending on role)

title: IT Business Analyst to Accounts & Payments | SEB, Solna
description:
SEB is a leading northern European financial services group, and at the same time, one of the largest IT employers in the Nordics. Banking is changing rapidly, and we are proud of our reputation for being entrepreneurial and innovative in the face of change.
   

  

 We are on a data Journey by migrating to Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and you will be contributing by working with requirements and data mapping in the payments reporting area.
   

  

**About the role:**
 As a Business/Requirement Analyst at SEB you will play a key part in our data transformation Journey to GCP within Accounts & Payments. In this role you will work cross teams to collect and write requirements in tight collaboration with your different stakeholders and support with data mapping.
   

  

 You will be a part of the Payments and Reporting area and work against several teams, as we work cross-functionally. You will get the opportunity to discuss problems and opportunities with over ten other Business Analysts but still be self-governing and plan your own schedule. We have an open culture where teamwork is the key to our success and our colleagues are more than happy to help.
   

  

 Your daily work will entail taking lead, coordinating and driving refinement work. You will also analyze and translate business needs into functional and system requirement specifications. Communication with stakeholders at all different levels (business-/operation experts, product management, architects, development teams, QA, subject matter experts…) to set the requirements and scope will also be a part of your everyday work life.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Worked as a Business Analyst at least 10 years in an agile environment and are used to document requirements in a structured manner
* You have a technical background, a technical education and/or have been working as a developer or tester
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken is critical for this role
* Experience from data analysis and mapping
* Always striving to understand the high level picture/ end-to-end (E2E) process
* You are interested to read and understand rules and regulations from authorities and translate them into requirements for development teams
* You are used to be involved in many initiatives at the same time and thrive in a fast-paced environment
* You have strong problem-solving skills and are structured and with excellent attention to detail
* You are used to coordinating and networking and using your communicative ability when working with stakeholder management in several areas
* As a person you have a strong drive and like to take initiatives, and you can define a task even if it initially is vague. You are pragmatic, adaptable and prestigeless
* You have experience of collecting requirements directly from stakeholders
* Knowledge/experience within the payments and reporting area would be considered as advantage


**What we offer:**
* A flat hierarchy and openness to share ideas, opinions and points of views
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* Remote working possibilities and flexible work schedule
* Access to SEB staff banking with exclusive benefits


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 Welcome to our inclusive culture, where our shared values inspire and uplift our team. We celebrate diversity and strive to ensure every employee feels seen, heard, and valued.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today. If you have questions about the position, please contact hiring manager Linn Malm at linn.malm@seb.se. Please note that due to GDPR issues we can only accept applications through the link below.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and criminal records checks. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment
   

  

**Learn more about working at SEBhere** 
 : www.sebgroup.com/techcareers
   

  

 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.

title: IT Tekniker
description:
Nu söker vi en
 **IT Tekniker** 
 som vill bidra med sin kompetens, utvecklas tillsammans med oss och som vill vara med och driva den digitala infrastruktur som håller det nordiska samhället igång. Kanske är du vår nästa kollega?
   

  

**We empower our Nordic society**
 Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation. Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort.
   

  

**Din roll på Iver**
 På Iver kommer du att arbeta i ett kundteam inriktat mot mindre till medelstora kunder kallat SMB. Det betyder att du i din roll har en tätare dialog med kunden och arbetar mer dedikerat med skräddarsydda lösningar. Du kommer tillhöra ett lokalt team som befinner sig i Stockholm.
   

  

 Du behöver kunna lite om allt som rör IT-drift och således ha en bred tekniska bakgrund. Du kommer arbeta med systemförbättringar, drift och underhåll av operativsystem och produktapplikationer i våra kunders IT-miljöer. Även med nyinstallationer, uppgraderingar, drift och andra typer av förbättringsarbeten. Du löser ärenden som vår servicedesk eskalerat vidare, och du förser dem i sin tur med kompetens, rutiner och dokumentation så att de löpande ska kunna lösa mer ärenden. Det händer att du sitter i kundmöten inför ett underhåll och planerar arbetet med kund.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen** 
  

  

 Tror vi att du har några års arbetslivserfarenhet inom IT- branschen med inriktning mot IT-drift. Du känner dig trygg i dina tekniska kompetenser men drivs också av att utvecklas och bygga på dina kunskaper och håller dig uppdaterad på nya tekniker. Du är en person som har en naturlig problemlösningsförmåga och känner dig trygg i att fatta egna beslut, du är involverande och engagerad i ditt arbete och dina kollegor, och du tycker att det är kul att både arbeta i team såväl som självständigt.
   

  

**Vi tror att du har erfarenhet av majoriteten nedan**
* Lösa tyngre användar-problem med djupgående felsökning
* Erfarenhet av installation, drift, felsökning och underhåll av Windows server-miljöer
* Windows Server med tillhörande tjänster, virtualisering, lagring och backup
* Microsoft 365, Office/exchange, Intune/Autopilot och Azure
* RDS och Citrix
* Molnlösningar och migrering, kommunikation och kombinationer av molnlösningar
* Säkerhet (patchning & MFA)
* Nätverkskunskap (brandväggar)
* Kommunikations-, övervaknings-, virusskydds- och säkerhetslösningar


**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 På Iver blir du en del av ett sammanhang där människor och teknik utvecklas tillsammans. Hos oss får du arbeta nära den senaste tekniken, bidra till samhällsviktig digitalisering och vara med på en spännande tillväxtresa.
   

  

 Vi tror på lärande, innovation och att växa tillsammans. Det finns alltid utrymme att utvecklas inom ditt specialistområde, utforska ny teknologi eller ta nästa steg i ditt ledarskap. Tillsammans utmanar vi etablerade arbetssätt, testar nytt och förbättrar kontinuerligt – eftersom vi vet att innovation skapas av människor som får möjlighet att tänka stort.
   

  

 Vi ger samma löfte till våra kollegor som till våra kunder: att alltid vara “beside you”, “behind you” och “before you”. Vi kallar det
 *The Iver Way* 
 .
   

  

**Förmåner hos oss:**
 📄 Kollektivavtal & trygga villkor
   

  

 🏠 Hybridarbete
   

  

 💪 Friskvårdsbidrag
   

  

 👓 Terminalglasögon
   

  

 ⏳ Tidsbank  – 24 h extra ledighet/år
   

  

 🩺 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension (ITP) & flexpension
   

  

 Skicka gärna in din ansökan redan idag – vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Iver eftersträvar en jämn könsfördelning och värdesätter etnisk och kulturell mångfald.  Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen använder vi tester för att säkerställa en rättvis och träffsäker bedömning.
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 2026-07-15
   

  

**Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Placeringsort:** 
 För denna roll ser vi att du utgår från vårt kontor i Solna.
   

  

**Övrig information:** 
 Vi har kunder inom alla branscher och sektorer inklusive säkerhetsklassad verksamhet, därför genomför vi bakgrundskontroller i samtliga av våra rekryteringsprocesser.
   

  

 Välkommen att kontakta kajsa.holzwart@iver.se vid frågor eller funderingar kring tjänsten.
   

  

*Vi undanber oss vänligen men bestämt all kontakt från externa rekryterings- och bemanningsföretag samt annonsförsäljare kring rekryteringen.*
**We empower our Nordic society** 
 . Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation.
   

  

**Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder – utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort.** 
 Vi säkerställer att sjukvården har tillgång till rätt patientdata, att samhällskritiska system aldrig ligger nere och att flygplanen landar säkert. Som en lyhörd och affärsnära helhetspartner möjliggör vi våra kunders innovation – idag och imorgon.

title: AI Engineer
description:
Join Mpya Digital AI as a caring and confident AI Engineer!
 



 We're a Stockholm-based tech consultancy building a new business area around agentic AI development, helping clients automate the work that shouldn't require a human. You will play a central role in shaping this business area from its very foundation.
 




 What you will do
 




 You'll work with our clients to identify what's worth automating and then build and ship it. That means:
 


* Read the business well enough to know where AI creates value
* Design and build agentic AI systems that run in production
* Own the work from architecture through deployment
* Help clients understand what they're getting and why it matters



 Your focus will be on both agent architecture and code as well as sitting across the table from non-technical leaders.
 




 What you will have accomplished
 




 A year in, this is what you'll be able to point to:
 


* Streamlined client workflows with agents in production, turning hours into seconds
* Enabled clients to query their own data directly through Claude via MCP integrations
* Built and deployed multi-agent systems handling real business processes, not demos




 Who you are
 




 You've built and shipped agentic AI systems using the Anthropic SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, or something comparable, and you know what production looks like.
 


* Hands-on with at least one agent SDK and real production deployments
* Strong grasp of tool use, orchestration, MCP, RAG, evaluation, and reliability
* Understanding of data quality and pipelines
* A feel for business: you can spot where AI creates value
* Comfortable with both technical and non-technical stakeholders



 You care about whether something works reliably, not whether it's built on the framework of the month.

title: IT Infrastructure Engineer
description:
*Nordnet is a leading pan-Nordic digital platform for savings and investments. Ever since our start in 1996, our purpose has been to democratize savings and investments. Through passion, simplicity, and transparency, we challenge traditional ways in the financial industry, and give private savers access to the same information, tools and services as professionals. Our ambition is to inspire, encourage and enable people to take their savings to the next level, no matter who they are.*
*Does a serious technical challenge make your heart beat faster? Do you give energy to those who work with you and are you looking for an energy boosting work environment? Then Nordnet is the place for you!*
**Your role**
 In your role as a system engineer within the team IT infrastructure, you will be responsible for continuously improving and maintaining our on-prem storage, servers and backup all the way from the hardware up to the operating system. Together with the team you will focus on automation and virtualisation to be able to handle the workloads. As a team we are forward leaning and always looking at new technologies to help us improve. Our experts within network will be your best friends and together you will ensure that our systems are always up and running and that our development teams can work at full speed. With Nordnet’s ongoing cloud journey, using Google Cloud Platform, you will also work closely together with our Cloud Squad to find synergies and with this have the opportunity to deepen your knowledge within this field.
   

  

*The position includes on call duty.*
**This is you**
**As a System Engineer You**
* are organized, careful and methodical in a way that benefits the team's working climate and ability to deliver high quality solutions
* are highly communicative, transparent and a good listener
* are used to work in high performing business critical systems
* keep track of the new trends in your area of expertise
* love new technology and see problems as an opportunity to improve
* are passionate about modern proactive operational work


**Background**
**You Are Well Founded In The Following**
* Virtualization (vmware)
* Linux (expert level)
* Google Cloud Platform
* IaC (Terraform)
* Python
* SAN
* Ansible
* Backup


**Good To Have**
* Network skills
* Experience from banking and finance


 Language skills: Fluent in English and Swedish is mandatory
   

  

**What We Offer**
 We offer you the opportunity to work in a great team within a friendly Nordic environment with a strong focus on innovation, product development and technology. We are proud of the friendly and humble environment and commit to our goals as a team.
   

  

 We are 1000 employees in Stockholm, Oslo, Helsinki, Copenhagen and Frankfurt.
   

  

 You can also visit us on: www.nordnet.se, www.nordnet.no, www.nordnet.dk, www.nordnet.fi
   

  

 and www.nordnet.de.
   

  

**Application**
 Please note that we do only accept applications through our recruitment system, hence no email applications will be considered.
   

  

 If you have questions, please contact Lovisa Malmberg, Talent Acquisition Partner, lovisa.malmberg@nordnet.se.
   

  

 We also want to inform you that Nordnet conducts mandatory credit and background checks, as well as drug testing as part of our recruitment process.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!

title: IT-Support | Förstalinje: Details
description:
**Job Description**
 Att arbeta på Coherent innebär att vara en del av ett globalt teknikbolag i framkant. Coherent är en av världens ledande aktörer inom fotonik, laserteknik och avancerade material, med omkring 35 000 medarbetare i över 20 länder. Våra lösningar används i allt från industriell tillverkning och halvledare till medicinteknik, forskning och kommunikation. Som medarbetare på Coherent får du möjlighet att utvecklas både professionellt och personligt i en organisation som kombinerar starkt lokalt engagemang med internationellt samarbete.
   

  

 Som IT Support på Coherent får du en vardag som är både tydlig och varierad. Du arbetar på plats i våra lokaler i Järfälla, där du stöttar kollegor i både renrums- och kontorsmiljön. Rollen handlar mycket om att ge praktisk hjälp: se till att datorer och tillbehör fungerar, installera och felsöka utrustning, hantera beställningar och konfigurering, och hjälpa användare som behöver stöd i sina system och verktyg.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter och ansvar**
* Arbeta på plats med förstalinjessupport i vår renrumsproduktion och på våra kontorsplatser.
* Hantera klienthårdvarans livscykel: beställning, mottagning, inventering och konfiguration av stationära datorer, bärbara datorer och tillbehör.
* Koordinera reparation och återställning av klienthårdvara med varierande ålder och operativsystem.
* Patcha nätverksuttag, vitlista och domänansluta produktionssystem och tillbehör.
* Hantera och tillhandahålla mobiltelefoner och abonnemang samt supportera lokala mobila tjänster och lösningar.
* Hantera skrivare och konferensrumsutrustning.
* Onboarding, offboarding och användaradministration.
* Samarbeta med kollegor både lokalt och internationellt, inklusive team i Europa, Indien och USA.
* Bidra till lokala och globala IT-projekt med fokus på hög servicekvalitet och kundnöjdhet.


**Kvalifikationer och erfarenhet**
* Erfarenhet av liknande teknisk roll, gärna inom industri, elektronik, optoelektronik eller tillverkningsmiljö.
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat, självständigt och med flera parallella uppgifter.
* Teknisk kompetens inom installation, felsökning och återställning av användarhårdvara eller testsystem.
* God samarbetsförmåga i tvärfunktionella team.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Microsofts miljöer (O365, SCCM, AD m.fl.).
* Flytande i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.
* God förmåga att prioritera och fatta genomtänkta beslut när IT-problem påverkar produktionen.


**Vår kultur**
 På Coherent arbetar vi enligt våra värderingar ICARE —
 **Integrity, Collaboration, Accountability, Respect och Enthusiasm** 
 — vilket präglar hur vi samarbetar, löser problem och stödjer verksamheten i det dagliga arbetet.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder**
* En tekniskt stimulerande miljö där du får utvecklas och bredda dina kunskaper inom IT.
* En stöttande, professionell och internationell arbetskultur.
* Ett innovationsdrivet företag i framkant.
* Subventionerad massage på kontoret och möjlighet till kvartalsvis eller årlig bonus.
* Generöst friskvårdsbidrag och hälsofrämjande aktiviteter.


 Om du är en motiverad IT-specialist som trivs i en samarbetsinriktad, innovativ och dynamisk miljö, uppmuntrar vi dig att ansöka och bli en del av vårt team i Järfälla.
   

  

 Vi tillämpar löpande urval. Som en del av processen genomförs referenstagning samt alkohol- och drogtest innan anställning.
   

  

**About Us**
 Coherent is a global leader in lasers, engineered materials and networking components. We are a vertically integrated manufacturing company that develops innovative products for diversified applications in the industrial, optical communications, military, life sciences, semiconductor equipment, and consumer markets. Coherent provides a comprehensive career development platform within an environment that challenges employees to perform at their best, while rewarding excellence and hard-work through a competitive compensation program. It's an exciting opportunity to work for a company that offers stability, longevity and growth. Come Join Us!
   

  

**Note to recruiters and employment agencies:** 
 We will not pay for unsolicited resumes from recruiters and employment agencies unless we have a signed agreement and have required assistance, in writing, for a specific opening.

title: IT Operations Specialist
description:
Stories have the power to make the ordinary extraordinary. They help us think bigger, see beyond ourselves, and deepen our connection with others.
   

  

 As one of the world's leading audiobook and e-book streaming platforms, Storytel brings unlimited listening to millions of users across 25 markets.
   

  

 Driven by our purpose, "Leading the future of storytelling, we move the world through stories", Storytel Group inspires and entertains people around the world by blending innovation with tradition. We bring stories to life across various formats for everyone to discover. Anytime. Anywhere.
   

  

**Ready for your next chapter? We're looking for an IT Operations Specialist to join our team in Stockholm!**
**About The Role**
 Do you want to architect, develop, and take technical ownership of modern cloud Digital Workplace platforms while remaining hands-on, managing daily operations and handling routine workplace IT tasks?
   

  

 The IT Operations team is currently scaling our responsibilities and operations.
   

  

 While Storytel’s core IT landscape is primarily built around Google Workspace and macOS, we are in an exciting phase where we are taking over the IT responsibility for companies within the group that mainly operate on Microsoft 365. We are looking for this role to act as the technical bridge for this expansion, which brings an exciting increase in technical complexity, multi-tenant environments, and global reach.
   

  

 In this role, you will step into a vital and highly versatile position. While your primary focus will be acting as our internal driver for MDM and Microsoft 365 governance, this is a broad role where you will manage and work across a wide array of different systems, applications, processes, and projects. Simultaneously, you will remain hands-on, supporting the team in daily operations and taking ownership of Workplace IT.
   

  

**Growth & Opportunities**
 For an ambitious candidate who successfully takes ownership and elevates our MDM and M365 environments, there are great opportunities to gradually shape the role and dive deeper into specialized infrastructure engineering and governance as our landscape evolves.
   

  

 Core Responsibilities
   

  

* MDM Evolution & Management: Take ownership of managing and developing our device management across our hybrid device fleet with Microsoft Intune and Jamf. You will architect, build, and maintain secure device configurations while also focusing on creating a great user experience with a distinct Storytel look and feel across all endpoints.
* M365 & Identity Governance: Architect, configure, and manage our Microsoft 365 environments within a complex multi-tenant structure. These environments are tightly integrated with Okta as part of an advanced identity architecture, utilizing HRiS as a Source
* SaaS System Administration: Daily administration, user lifecycle management, and optimization of various SaaS systems used and provided across the group.
* IT Projects & Continuous Improvement: Actively lead and execute various internal IT projects. You will be a driving force behind onboarding new group environments and constantly leveling up our technical setup.
* Vendor Management & Procurement: Manage relationships and contracts with external IT vendors, hardware suppliers, and SaaS providers. You will oversee software licensing, optimize procurement processes, and ensure we partner with the right external stakeholders.


**Operational & Workplace Responsibilities**
* Office & AV technology: Driving the continuous improvement and development of our office technology and meeting rooms, while overseeing daily operations and support
* IT-Equipment Management: Managing IT equipment lifecycle operations (procurement, inventory logistics, and on/offboarding setups) for a device fleet consisting primarily of MacBooks, alongside an increasing number of Windows devices.
* Daily IT-support: Handling a broad variety of daily support requests from our end-users, both on-site and remote. Ranging from complex technical troubleshooting to routine, autopilot tasks


**Requirements & Qualifications**
* Technical Experience: At least 3–5 years of experience working within IT operations, modern workplace management, or system administration.
* MDM & M365 Expertise: Proven experience configuring and administering Microsoft Intune (device configuration, compliance policies, deployment) and managing Microsoft 365 environments. Experience with multi-tenant setups is a major plus.
* Hands-on IT Support: Solid experience handling day-to-day workplace IT, end-user support, and hardware lifecycle management.
* Advanced Workstation & OS Expertise: Deep technical knowledge of both Windows and macOS ecosystems, naturally becoming the go-to person in the team for anything related to computer management and troubleshooting.
* Bonus Platform Knowledge: Experience with Okta, Google Workspace and Jamf is a strong advantage.
* Language: Professional fluency in English, both written and spoken.


**Who You Are**
 To thrive in this position, we are looking for a specific mindset and personality. We believe you recognize yourself in the following:
   

  

* Autonomous & Driven: You don't wait for instructions. You identify what needs to be done, set your own agenda, and drive your initiatives to completion with high energy.
* AI-Forward & Efficiency-Minded: You have a strong understanding of how to leverage AI to optimize your work. Actively finding ways to integrate AI into our systems to automate processes is critical to your success in this role.
* Genuinely Tech-Savvy: You love technology and are motivated by continuous improvement. You take great pride in delivering high-quality, stable, and well-structured solutions.
* People-Centric & Service-Minded: You are a genuine "people person" who excels at building relationships. You will interact extensively with users both at the office and in various other contexts, making a highly service-oriented mindset and strong interpersonal skills essential.
* Humble & Versatile (Prestigeless): You move seamlessly between high-level cloud architecture and helping a colleague with an urgent hardware issue. You are ready to work broadly and jump in wherever the team needs you most.
* Process-Minded: You have a natural ability to see the bigger picture and design structured, scalable processes rather than relying on ad-hoc fixes.


**Location & Workplace**
 We operate on trust, meaning you have the freedom to manage your own calendar, shape your week, and adjust your daily working hours to fit your life.
   

  

 Since a vital part of your role involves managing our physical office ecosystem and hands-on device troubleshooting, this role naturally relies on your physical presence at our Stockholm HQ on a daily basis. However, you will have autonomy over your daily calendar and how you pace your hours.
   

  

 What We Offer
   

  

 A role with high autonomy, immense learning potential, and the chance to leave your mark on a global IT infrastructure from day one. You will join a skilled team that values initiative, continuous learning, and having fun along the way.
   

  

 Join a world of stories
   

  

 At Storytel, we're a team of creative story lovers who thrive on collaboration and new ideas. Our workplace is friendly, dynamic, and full of opportunities to experiment and make an impact. We believe in trust, flat hierarchies, and empowering you to grow with us.
   

  

 Does this sound like your next story? Simply fill out the application form and share your CV or LinkedIn profile.
 **Please include your portfolio with your application.** 
 Answer a few questions, and you're all set.

title: System Manager to LIAC Platform / Lumera Core | SEB Life & Pension, Solna
description:
Do you want to play a key role in operating and strengthening a business‑critical core insurance platform?
   

  

 We are now looking for a System Manager to our LIAC platform, built on Lumera Core, where stable operations, proactive improvements, and close collaboration are key to success.
   

  

**About The Role**
 LIAC is SEB Life & Pension’s core administration platform for life insurance. The platform is operated across multiple environments, where the same application runs both on established server‑based platforms and in containerised environments. Container technology is widely used today and plays an important role in development, testing, and daily operations, alongside more traditional setups.
   

  

 As a System Manager, you are responsible for ensuring stable, secure, and predictable operations across this landscape. The role combines hands‑on system management with a proactive mindset, focusing on monitoring, automation, and continuous operational improvement. You will support the platform as it exists today while contributing to increased operational maturity over time.
   

  

 You will work closely with development teams, test automation, product ownership, and our vendor Lumera.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities Include**
* Platform operations: Ensure availability, performance, security, and stability of the LIAC platform
* Operational improvements: Proactively identify and implement improvements in monitoring, alerting, and operational processes
* Automation: Reduce manual operational work by driving automation of deployments, configuration, health checks, and recovery where appropriate
* Incident and problem management: Act as a key technical role during incidents, focusing on resolution, root‑cause analysis, and preventive actions
* Vendor collaboration: Work closely with Lumera on platform upgrades, changes, and operational follow‑ups
* Documentation and compliance: Ensure proper documentation, audit readiness, and compliance with SEB security and regulatory requirements


 To thrive in this role, we believe you have
   

  

* Experience working as a System Manager or in a similar operational role within business‑critical systems
* A solid understanding of system operations across different technical environments, including both traditional platforms and containerised setups
* Experience with monitoring, alerting, and proactive operational work
* A strong interest in automation and improving operational efficiency
* Good understanding of relational databases and hands‑on experience reading, analysing, and correcting SQL scripts
* Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills, and the ability to work collaboratively with developers and suppliers
* Good knowledge of English, both spoken and written
* Experience from Lumera, insurance administration systems, or other regulated environments is considered a merit, but not a requirement.


**What We Offer**
 We offer a wide range of benefits and opportunities, but at the core of our offering you will find:
   

  

* An international and collaborative working environment
* The opportunity to help transform an entire industry
* Extensive training and continuous learning opportunities
* An inclusive and value-driven culture
* The chance to deliver world-class services to our customers


 Do you want to be part of SEB?
   

  

 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 21st of June 2026. If you have questions about the position, please contact Laban Bondesson, Hiring Manager, at laban.bondesson@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and criminal records checks. We also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career

title: DevOps Engineer – Data & Analytics | SEB, Solna
description:
*SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you'll be interested in this opportunity!*
 Our tribe Data and Analytics lead all parts of SEB in becoming a data driven company, and we are looking for a Site Reliability Engineer to strengthen our team in Stockholm working in the area of large-scale data solutions
   

  

**About The Job**
 We are an agile department working on building a scalable, sustainable and reliable data platform to provide exceptional experience for our customers. Our teams are cross-country working in both Sweden and Lithuania. You will be working in an agile Scrum team in a SRE like role. Currently, we are in the cloud transformation process. There will be a lot of activities to migrate to the cloud as well as on-board new applications.
   

  

 Together with your colleagues you will be responsible for on-boarding new tooling to our stack. Everything with security and automation in mind. You will have the opportunity to broaden your competence and will be given a generous amount of time for your own ideas and projects. Keep in mind that this should cover all aspects of application lifecycle items.
   

  

 In order to thrive here you should be interested in devops engineering and like finding creative solutions to complex problems. If you are analytical, curious and have a passion for discovering new ways of working, you will enjoy it here.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Experience from working in Linux environments.
* Experience from OpenShift on prem
* Programming and scripting skills (e.g. bash, python)
* Experience from working with container orchestration (e.g. Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift) and Terraform
* An automation, DevOps, SRE mindset
* Version control systems (e.g. Git)
* Database knowledge (e.g. SQL, NoSQL)
* Collaboration skills and high sense of responsibility. We are working team based, and the ability to share knowledge and experience is fundamental.


**Nice-to-have**
* Experience from working with Validio
* Experience with monitoring, metrics and log management systems (e.g. Zabbix, Grafana, Splunk)
* Knowledge of authentication and authorization services (e.g. EntraID, LDAP, OAuth 2.0)
* Automation and configuration management systems (e.g. Ansible, Terraform, Chef)
* Cloud technologies
* CI/CD, such as GitHub Actions, Jenkins

title: Process Engineer
description:
**ALTEN söker nu en Process Engineer!** 




  





 Vi söker dig som är passionerad av processutveckling och teknisk problemlösning inom biologisk tillverkning. Vill du arbeta med formulering, aseptisk fyllning och förpackning av avancerade bioläkemedel? Då kan detta vara din nästa utmaning som konsult på ALTEN!
 



  





**VAD ERBJUDER VI?** 



* Som konsult på ALTEN får du möjlighet att arbeta med utmanande och spännande projekt hos några av våra viktigaste kunder, med:
* Tekniska utmaningar och utvecklingsmöjligheter.
* En inspirerande gemenskap och möjlighet att bidra till en säker och hållbar framtid.
* Stöttande och coachande ledarskap.
* Möjlighet att arbeta inom life science-branschen och andra reglerade miljöer.
* En personlig utbildningsbudget för interna eller externa kurser.



  





**VAD ROLLEN INNEBÄR** 




 Som Process Engineer på ALTEN kommer du att ingå i ett team som stöttar och utvecklar formulerings-, fyllnings- och förpackningsprocesser för biologiska läkemedel. Du kommer att arbeta med teknisk support, avvikelsehantering och kontinuerliga förbättringar i en GMP-reglerad miljö. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med tillverkning, automation, kvalitet och teknik för att säkerställa stabila och effektiva processer.
 


* Stödja och förbättra formulering och aseptisk fyllning av biologiska läkemedel.
* Utreda och lösa processrelaterade problem med strukturerad felsökning och rotorsaksanalys.
* Genomföra och utvärdera förbättringsprojekt för att öka kvalitet, utbyte och kostnadseffektivitet.
* Samarbeta tvärfunktionellt med olika avdelningar för att säkerställa smidiga produktintroduktioner och drift.
* Bidra till dokumentation såsom arbetsinstruktioner, riskbedömningar och tekniska rapporter.
* Stödja eller leda valideringsaktiviteter (IQ/OQ/PQ) för ny utrustning och processer.



  





**VI SÖKER DIG SOM:** 




 Vi söker dig som är tekniskt skicklig, strukturerad och drivs av att leverera resultat. Du trivs med att arbeta både självständigt och i team och har förmågan att kommunicera tydligt med olika intressenter.
 


* Erfarenhet av formulering och/eller aseptisk fyllning av biologiska läkemedel eller liknande processer.
* cGMP i reglerad tillverkning.
* Produktionsutrustning, anläggningar och instrumentering.
* Erfarenhet från start-up-miljöer, nya anläggningar eller produktionslinjer.
* Kunskap om validering och kvalificering (IQ/OQ/PQ).
* Erfarenhet av GMP för sterila processer och aseptiska regulatoriska krav.
* Erfarenhet av Lean Manufacturing och dokumenterade förbättringar.
* Talar svenska och engelska flytande.



  





**TIDSRAM:** 
 9 månaders uppdrag, med start i Augusti 2026
 **.** 




  





**VARFÖR ALTEN?** 




 På ALTEN blir du en del av ett högt kvalificerat team som arbetar med några av de mest spännande projekten inom life science och teknik. Vi erbjuder en kultur där du kan växa, utmana dig själv och göra verklig skillnad i projekt som formar framtidens lösningar.
 



  





**OM ALTEN** 




 ALTEN är ett av Europas största teknik- och IT-konsultföretag med över 60 000 medarbetare i mer än 30 länder. I Sverige är vi 1 300 konsulter på 11 orter, från Malmö till Skellefteå, och stöttar världsledande företag inom Automotive, Telecom, Industry, Energy, Aerospace & Defense och Life Science.
 



  





 För sjätte året i rad har ALTEN utsetts till ett av Sveriges mest attraktiva arbetsgivare av Karriärföretagen.
 



  





 Välkommen in att läsa mer om oss på
 *alten.se.* 




  





*Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!*

title: IT-Konsult med affärsfokus
description:
***Vill du arbeta i en roll där du kombinerar teknik, verksamhetsförståelse och kunddialog?***




*Vi söker nu en IT-konsult, internt kallad vCIO (Virtual Chief Information Officer), som vill arbeta med att utveckla och strukturera våra kunders IT-miljöer.* 




  





**Om rollen** 




 Som vCIO hos Sharp arbetar du i skärningspunkten mellan teknik, affär och kunddialog. Din uppgift är att hjälpa kunder att fatta rätt beslut kring sin IT – både här och nu och på längre sikt.
 



  





 Du är en rådgivare som förstår kundens verksamhet och kan omsätta behov till konkreta IT‑lösningar. Rollen innebär att du är med tidigt i affären, stöttar sälj i dialoger och lösningsförslag, och sedan fortsätter som en strategisk partner när kunden är på plats.
 



 Du driver utvecklingen av kundernas IT‑miljöer framåt – du ifrågasätter, föreslår förbättringar och säkerställer att lösningarna faktiskt skapar värde.
 



 Internt arbetar du nära både sälj och tekniska team, där du fungerar som en brygga mellan affär och leverans.
 



  





**Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden** 



* **Kundutveckling** 
 – Analysera kundens verksamhet och IT-miljö samt identifiera förbättringsområden och tekniska initiativ.
* **Presales** 
 – Stötta sälj i att ta fram tekniskt förankrade lösningsförslag samt delta i kundmöten.
* **Lösning & genomförande** 
 – Bidra till design av lösningar, arkitektur och teknikval samt stötta i implementationsprojekt.
* **Uppföljning & förbättring** 
 – Följa upp levererade lösningar och IT-miljöer över tid samt identifiera behov av justeringar och vidareutveckling.
* **Internt utvecklingsarbete** 
 – Bidra till vidareutveckling av erbjudanden, arbetssätt och kunskapsdelning inom organisationen.



  





**Vi tror att du har:** 



* Erfarenhet som IT‑konsult, arkitekt eller liknande roll
* God teknisk bredd inom exempelvis: Microsoft 365, Azure, Intune & Defender, Serverdrift och nätverk
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta nära kund och omsätta behov till tekniska lösningar
* Förmåga att översätta teknik till affärsvärde
* Erfarenhet av presales eller lösningsdesign är meriterande
* B-körkort



  





**För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du är:** 



* Affärsdriven och har ett intresse för kommersiella lösningar
* Kommunikativ och trygg i dialog med kund
* Analytisk och lösningsorienterad
* Prestigelös och samarbetsinriktad
* Positiv och bidrar till en öppen, inkluderande kultur



  





**Vårt erbjudande** 




 Vi må vara ett stort och globalt bolag – ja! Men här i Norden ser vi oss som ett sammansvetsat lag där alla är välkomna. Våra värdeord –
 *uppriktighet & kreativitet* 
 – har följt med oss sedan 1912 och finns med i allt vi gör. För oss innebär det att vi är inkluderande, ställer upp för varandra, hittar nya vägar och ser möjligheter även i motgångar. Det är vi - alla medarbetare på Sharp – som är vår kultur, det är vi som tillsammans växer och det är vi som är varandras arbetsmiljö!
 



  





 För att vi ska kunna växa tillsammans utbildar vi såväl ledare som medarbetare inom olika områden. Som medarbetare på Sharp är du bland annat en del av
 *Sharp Learning Forum* 
 där vi tillsammans utbildar varandra inom våra olika kompetensområden, allt för att skapa en högre kunskap och förståelse för varandras vardag!
 



  





 Vi skulle kunna prata på i en evighet om varför just du ska jobba hos oss, bland annat om vår tro på vikten av hälsa och balans i vardagen (där vi exempelvis erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag och friskvårdstimme), vårt brinnande engagemang för arbetsmiljö och hållbarhet eller att vi har en AW-grupp som för oss samman med roliga aktiviteter, men vi får pausa här och se fram emot att berätta mer i ett personligt möte!
 



  





**Om Sharp** 




 Sharp erbjuder lösningar för digitala arbetsplatser. Med vår gedigna erfarenhet, lokala förankring och breda kunskap levererar vi helhetslösningar för organisationer, oavsett bransch eller storlek. Det handlar om datorer, digitala möten och säker dokumenthantering till kompletta mötesrum, IT-drift, arbetsplatshantering och betallösningar. Vi säkerställer att företag alltid har rätt förutsättningar, utbildning och verktyg för att öka samarbete, kommunikation och säkerhet.

title: Data Engineer with GCP developer skills | SEB, Solna
description:

* Data engineering with experience of Data analytics
* Data integration, data modelling, and data pipelines
* Are a confident and skilled developer with strong technical expertise
* Are motivated by creating high‑value, business‑driven solutions
