title: Infrastrukturspecialist inom DevOps
description:
Vi söker en Infrastrukturspecialist till vår kund i Danderyd som arbetar med utveckling och drift av avancerade IT-miljöer där säkerhet, tillgänglighet och stabilitet är affärskritiska faktorer.
 



  





 I rollen blir du en viktig del av IT Operations-teamet och ansvarar för drift, underhåll och vidareutveckling av både interna system och kundmiljöer. Du arbetar i komplexa IT-miljöer med höga säkerhetskrav och får möjlighet att kombinera traditionell infrastrukturdrift med moderna arbetssätt inom automation, DevOps och plattformsförvaltning.
 



  





 Du kommer att arbeta nära erfarna kollegor med bred teknisk kompetens och bidra till att säkerställa en robust, säker och effektiv IT-infrastruktur.
 



  





 Tjänsten är en direktrekrytering vilket innebär att du blir anställd direkt hos vår kund.
 



  





**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter** 



* Drift, underhåll och övervakning av Windows- och Linuxmiljöer
* Administration och förvaltning av virtualiserade plattformar
* Installation, deployment och uppdatering av system i säkerhetskritiska miljöer
* Arbete i isolerade (air-gappade) nätverk med höga krav på säkerhet och tillgänglighet
* Automation av återkommande administrativa uppgifter och arbete med Infrastructure as Code
* Övervakning av infrastruktur, logganalys och larmhantering
* Systemhärdning, patchhantering och säkerhetsrelaterade förbättringsåtgärder
* Medverkan vid implementation och driftsättning av nya IT-lösningar
* Felsökning och analys av komplexa infrastrukturella och systemrelaterade problem



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som har en bred teknisk bakgrund inom IT-infrastruktur och systemförvaltning samt ett stort intresse för teknik och informationssäkerhet.
 



  





 Du har erfarenhet av att arbeta i komplexa IT-miljöer och känner dig bekväm i både Windows- och Linuxbaserade plattformar. Du trivs i en roll där du får ta eget ansvar, driva tekniska förbättringar och bidra till utvecklingen av en modern och säker IT-miljö.
 



  





 Som person är du analytisk, lösningsorienterad och har ett strukturerat arbetssätt. Du uppskattar samarbete och kunskapsutbyte samtidigt som du har förmågan att självständigt driva ditt arbete framåt.
 



  





*Krav* 



* Erfarenhet av administration och drift av Windows- och Linuxmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av arbete i komplexa och säkerhetskritiska IT-miljöer
* Erfarenhet av DevOps-relaterade verktyg och plattformar såsom Docker, Git, Ansible, Jenkins eller GitLab CI
* Erfarenhet av monitorering och logghantering, exempelvis Prometheus och Grafana
* Grundläggande kunskap inom IT-säkerhet, brandväggar, VPN och säker fjärradministration
* Erfarenhet av automation och Infrastructure as Code
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift



  





*Meriterande* 



* Erfarenhet av virtualiseringsplattformar
* Erfarenhet av arbete i air-gappade miljöer
* Erfarenhet av systemhärdning och säkerhetsarbete enligt etablerade ramverk
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetsklassade eller säkerhetsskyddade verksamheter
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD-processer och automatiserade deployments



  





**Övrigt** 




 Tjänsten är placerad i säkerhetsklass vilket innebär att säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll genomförs före anställning enligt gällande regelverk.
 



  





**Om kunden** 




 Vår kund erbjuder en tekniskt avancerad miljö där säkerhet, kvalitet och innovation står i fokus. Här får du möjlighet att arbeta med modern teknik, bidra till verksamhetskritiska lösningar och utvecklas tillsammans med kunniga kollegor.

title: Master thesis in AIOps | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Do you want to explore how artificial intelligence can shape the future of operations in one of the leading technology-driven banks in the Nordics?
   

  

 At SEB, we believe in combining innovation, collaboration, and long-term thinking to create real value for our customers and society. We are now offering a master’s thesis opportunity within AIOps for students who want to combine academic depth with hands-on relevance and contribute to applied research where AI, observability, and large-scale operations meet.
   

  

**About The Thesis**
 This thesis opportunity is for students who are excited by the possibility of applying AI to meaningful, real-world challenges in Operations. Together with the AIOps team, you will define a research question, place it in a relevant academic and technical context, and design a suitable methodology for investigation. Depending on the chosen scope, the work may include data analysis, model development, system design, experimentation, or comparative evaluation of alternative approaches. The ambition is to create work that is both academically solid and practically valuable.
   

  

 AIOps is a collaborative and technically ambitious team working across infrastructure, data platforms, AI-enabled services, and internal applications. As a thesis student at SEB, you will work with experts, learn about large-scale technology, and apply research methods to create practical solutions.
   

  

*Example research directions* 
 :
   

  

* Agentic AI: Autonomous agents that automate and optimize operations
* Multi-agent workflows: Several AI agents collaborating on complex tasks such as distributed detection, coordinated response, or resource allocation
* Predictive models for incident escalation or service degradation
* Root-cause analysis using machine learning or graph-based methods
* Refine large language models for knowledge retrieval and decision support
* Optimize anomaly detection in operational telemetry


 The final thesis topic will be selected collaboratively based on student interest and feasibility.
   

  

**Who You Are**
* Curious, analytical, and structured in your way of working
* Interested in AI, data-driven analysis, and operational improvement
* You are motivated by the opportunity to explore a relevant research problem in close collaboration with industry and inspired by the possibility of creating work that combines academic quality with real-world value.
* It is a plus if you have experience with AI/ML, cloud-native systems, or Git-based workflows


**What You Can Expect**
* A chance to work on real operational challenges in a modern, data-rich, and business-critical environment
* Close collaboration with experienced engineers and practitioners in an environment that values curiosity, learning, and knowledge sharing
* An opportunity to produce academically meaningful work while contributing insights that can support SEB’s continued technology transformation


**How To Apply**
 Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, and we therefore encourage you to apply as soon as possible, but no later than 30th June 2026. Please include your CV, academic transcripts, and a brief motivation describing your interest in the thesis area and why you would be a strong match for this opportunity. We look forward to hearing from students who want to combine academic excellence with the opportunity to create meaningful impact at SEB.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks.
   

  

**Learn more about working at SEB** 
 on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Tech Lead till ID06
description:
Vill du ta ett större ansvar för teknikval, arkitektur och teamets utveckling och samtidigt bidra till ett viktigt samhällsuppdrag?
   

  

 ID06 driver affärer som bidrar till att minska arbetskraftskriminalitet och fusk i Sverige. Vårt uppdrag är att främja sund konkurrens, motverka svartarbete och ekonomisk brottslighet samt bidra till schyssta villkor på arbetsmarknaden.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en Tech Lead som vill kombinera djup teknisk kompetens med ett ledande ansvar och vara med och utveckla lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för arbetsmarknaden.
   

  

 Rollen är både strategisk och operativ med stort tekniskt ansvar. Som Tech Lead hos oss får du en nyckelroll i att forma och vidareutveckla våra egenutvecklade digitala tjänster från arkitektur och design till implementation och drift.
   

  

 Du leder det tekniska arbetet i teamet, coachar kollegor och säkerställer att vi bygger robusta, säkra och skalbara lösningar i en modern molnmiljö (Microsoft Azure).
   

  

 Du arbetar nära produktägare, verksamhet och andra utvecklare för att omsätta affärsbehov till hållbara och genomtänkta tekniska lösningar.
   

  

 Rollen ger dig stort mandat att påverka teknikval, arbetssätt, processer och att vara en teknisk förebild som driver kvalitet, säkerhet och innovation framåt.
   

  

**Du kommer att:**
* Leda och coacha utvecklingsteamet i tekniska frågor och best practice samt även vara aktiv i utvecklingsarbetet
* Ansvara för systemarkitektur, designbeslut och teknisk roadmap
* Säkerställa kodkvalitet, testbarhet och stabila leveranser
* Driva teknisk förbättring, automatisering och utveckling av DevOps-processer
* Omvärldsbevaka ny teknik och initiera relevanta förbättringar
* Vara ett tekniskt bollplank till produktägare och bidra i prioritering och planering
* Delta aktivt i rekrytering och kompetensutveckling


**Därför kommer du att trivas hos oss**
 Hos oss blir du en del av en inkluderande och framåtblickande organisation där du får stort inflytande, möjlighet att växa och chansen att bidra till något som verkligen gör skillnad.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder bland annat:
   

  

* En strategisk och operativ roll med stort mandat
* Möjlighet att arbeta med hela kedjan - från idé till produktion
* En modern, molnbaserad miljö med fokus på kvalitet, säkerhet och automation
* Kompetenta och engagerade kollegor i ett öppet och prestigelöst klimat
* Kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och stöd för certifieringar
* Moderna kontor centralt i Stockholm, Göteborg och Jönköping
* Hybrid- och distansarbete
* Kollektivavtal (ITP1), arbetstidsförkortning, sjukvårdsförsäkring och friskvårdsbidrag
* Ett bolag med en viktig roll i samhället


**Det här söker vi hos dig**
 För att lyckas i rollen har du flera års erfarenhet av systemutveckling i moderna teknologier, exempelvis .NET, Node.js, Python, Java, React och Azure.
   

  

 Vi ser att du:
   

  

* Har dokumenterad erfarenhet av att leda team, projekt eller tekniska initiativ
* Är van att ta ansvar för arkitektur, teknikval och leverans
* Har god förståelse för molnbaserad utveckling och CI/CD
* Behärskar svenska mycket väl, i tal och skrift
* Är en trygg problemlösare och kommunikativ ledare
* Trivs i tvärfunktionellt samarbete nära affären
* Har ett starkt intresse för ny teknik och att driva förbättring


**Ansökan och information**
 I denna rekrytering samarbetar ID06 med Experis IT. Vid frågor är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Anki Snis på 08-508 954 53 eller via e-post: anki.snis@se.experis.com.
   

  

 Omfattning: Heltid. Vi tillämpar provanställning.
   

  

 Säkerhetskontroll genomförs före anställning.
   

  

 Intervjuer sker löpande - skicka därför gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Om oss**
 ID06 utvecklar, säljer och förvaltar lösningar som säkerställer att företag och deras medarbetare har rätt att arbeta i Sverige och har lämnat korrekta uppgifter. Genom att motarbeta svartarbete, arbetslivskriminalitet och ekonomisk brottslighet bidrar vi till sund konkurrens och att alla spelar efter samma regler - i bygg- och fastighetssektorn och i andra branscher.
   

  

 ID06 AB grundades 2006 av Byggföretagen med målet att främja sund konkurrens och säkra arbetsplatser.
   

  

 Sedan starten har vårt fokus varit bygg- och fastighetsbranschen. Nu utvecklar vi våra digitala tjänster vidare och möter behov i fler branscher där kraven på kontroll av identitet, medborgarskap och rätten att arbeta i Sverige ökar.

title: .Net/C# developer to the Portfolio Solutions and Derivatives Clearing Tech team
description:
Do you want to work where technology, delivery, and real business needs come together?
   

  

 Join a strong tech team in Arenastaden, closely connected to Kungsträdgården and the London office. You will support Portfolio Solutions and Derivatives Clearing with modern technical solutions - today and tomorrow.
   

  

**About the role:**
 As a Solution Developer, you will be part of a team responsible for developing and maintaining modern business solutions supporting two product areas: Portfolio Solutions and Derivatives Clearing. The domain is evolving, and you will contribute to building systems that create tangible customer and business value.
   

  

 You will join a team of nine ambitious and creative colleagues, working primarily with back‑end solutions while also contributing to our future client‑facing portal, Business Arena. The role also includes participation in the development of several new cloud‑native solutions, in close collaboration with quantitative analysts within Investor Services and CIB, as well as our Solution Architect.
   

  

 In this role, you will:
   

  

* Work closely with product management and product specialists to explore ideas, refine requirements, and deliver business value
* Develop and maintain business systems and integration
* Contribute to the evolution of our microservice‑based architecture
* Design and deliver innovative technical solutions across our product areas


 To thrive in this role, we believe:
   

  

* You are a solution‑oriented developer with a few years of experience in modern software development and a strong drive to deliver.
* You enjoy working close to product management and business, turning ideas into solutions that create real value. You communicate well, thrive in collaborative teams, and are curious about financial markets.
* You bring solid skills in C# and .NET / .NET Core, with hands‑on experience in Python, GCP, SQL Server, and REST APIs.
* Experience with cloud-native architectures, containers, observability, or Angular is a plus. A positive mindset and eagerness to learn are essential.
* Experience or interest in applying AI tools (e.g. generative AI, Copilot, or automation solutions) in software development.


**What we offer:**
 We offer many experiences and benefits to our employees, and there is nuance to every individual’s career experience, but the elements that define the core of our offering are:
   

  

* Great opportunities for professional development and insight into Investor Services Institutions product landscape
* A dynamic, professional, and multicultural environment
* An empowering and inclusive workplace culture
* Hybrid Workplace setup


**Ready to take the next step on your career journey?**
 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today, but no later than
 **22nd** 
 of June. If you have questions about the position please contact Johan Schalling, Team manager by mail Johan.schalling@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks. SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

title: React Native Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

**The role**
 As a React Native Engineer, you will join our Engineering team and help build scalable, high-performance mobile applications. You’ll own features end-to-end, collaborate across design, product, and backend teams, and ensure our mobile experience is fast, smooth, and delightful for users.
   

  

 This role is perfect for someone who thrives in a builder-first, entrepreneurial environment — where your ideas, initiative, and technical skill directly shape the product and the company’s growth.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Build, ship, and maintain cross-platform mobile apps using React Native and sometimes help out on our core web app too
* Work with technologies such as React, React Native, and Node.js
* Collaborate closely with design, product, and other engineers to create seamless user experiences.
* Optimize app performance, reliability, and responsiveness.
* Contribute to mobile architecture decisions and code quality best practices.
* Own projects end-to-end, from concept to release and iteration.
* Stay up-to-date with mobile trends and technologies to keep Legora ahead of the curve.


**Who You Are**
* An engineer with experience building and shipping modern software products.
* Comfortable working across the stack, with solid skills in React Native development.
* Passionate about writing maintainable, secure code—and take pride in building things that last.
* A problem solver who enjoys thinking about architecture, data flows, and long-term sustainability.
* Familiar with cloud infrastructure, distributed systems, and integrations (experience with enterprise-scale systems is a plus, but not required).
* Proactive, curious, and motivated by working in a fast-paced, collaborative startup environment.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Agentic AI Automation Specialist
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom Applications team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda, skalbara och säkra cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation. AI är en nyckelteknologi i allt vi gör och en central del i hur vi formar och bygger moderna system och lösningar, där intelligenta AI-drivna arbetssätt och teknologier som Agentic AI driver utvecklingen framåt. Bli en del av oss och var med och forma framtidens system tillsammans med världsledande organisationer och bidra till att frigöra teknikens fulla potential i en mer hållbar och inkluderande värld!
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som konsult inom Agentic AI Automation blir du en del av ett agilt team som arbetar med komplexa projekt och utvecklar lösningar anpassade för olika branscher, baserade på AI och molnteknik. Tillsammans med våra kunder tar vi fram kreativa och tekniska lösningar, bland annat inom RPA (Robotic Process Automation) och Agentisk AI för att möjliggöra end-to-end automatisering av affärsprocesser. I och med att rollen är ny får du stort utrymme att påverka dess utveckling och forma vägen framåt med möjlighet att skapa verkligt värde både för Capgemini och våra kunder.
   

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*
* Att analysera verksamhetsprocesser och identifiera automationsmöjligheter genom att kombinera insikter från RPA och Process Mining med moderna, AI drivna arbetssätt för att skapa smartare och mer effektiva end to end lösningar.
* Att leda, utveckla och orkestrera automationslösningar, där agentisk AI, RPA och API drivna system samverkar i kompletta end to end arbetsflöden.


**Din profil**
* Erfarenhet av agentbaserade AI‑lösningar och hur autonoma agenter designas, tränas och optimeras.
* Färdighet i att bygga AI‑drivna agenter i exempelvis Power Platform, UiPath, BluePrism eller Googles AI‑ och molnplattformar.
* Förståelse för orkestrering av agenter över flera plattformar och hur de samverkar i end‑to‑end‑processer.
* Expertis inom RPA: UiPath, Power Automate och BluePrism.
* Erfarenhet av Process Mining och UiPath testautomation är en fördel.
* Flytande kunskaper i engelska och svenska i tal och skrift.


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**
* Möjligheten att forma och driva Agentic AI Automation hos våra kunder och internt.
* Tillgång till den senaste tekniken och plattformar som Microsoft Copilot, Azure AI foundry.
* UiPath Agentic och Google Cloud, samt ett globalt nätverk av experter.
* Ingå i ett agilt och nyfiket team med drivkraft att skapa verklig intelligent automation.
* En kultur som uppmuntrar innovation, kompetensutveckling och kunskapsdelning, där du får utrymme att leda förändring och skapa impact.
* Vi värdesätter balans mellan arbete och privatliv med flexibla arbetsarrangemang för att du ska kunna balansera ditt arbetsliv med ditt privatliv.


**Ansökan**
*Varmt välkommen med din ansökan till oss! Vi inleder våra processer med att prata om vad du är intresserad av att göra som nästa steg och vi är genuint nyfikna över vilka faktorer som får dig att trivas på jobbet. Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*
**Om Capgemini**
 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med över 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,5 miljarder euro för 2025.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Software Developer 3
description:
**Job Description**
 Oracle’s Java Platform Group is looking for a software engineer with experience in managed runtimes and garbage collection to join their world class development team. This is a great opportunity to work with some of the most experienced and knowledgeable people in the virtual machine space, working on the Java Virtual Machine that is used by millions of developers and Fortune 500 companies around the world.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**RESPONSIBILITIES**
* Design and implement new Java Virtual Machine garbage collection features and optimizations
* Collaborate with the OpenJDK community on potential contributions
* Work closely with the rest of the engineering team to review designs and ensure optimum JVM execution performance


**Requirements**
* Strong proficiency in C++ and multi-threaded development
* Working knowledge of Java development
* Self-motivated and able to independently drive development efforts
* Strong communication and team work skills
* Strong grasp of garbage collection and systems fundamentals
* Hands-on experience with OpenJDK is highly desirable


**Qualifications**
 Career Level - IC4
   

  

**About Us**
 Only Oracle brings together the data, infrastructure, applications, and expertise to power everything from industry innovations to life-saving care. And with AI embedded across our products and services, we help customers turn that promise into a better future for all. Discover your potential at a company leading the way in AI and cloud solutions that impact billions of lives.
   

  

 True innovation starts when everyone is empowered to contribute. That’s why we’re committed to growing a workforce that promotes opportunities for all with competitive benefits that support our people with flexible medical, life insurance, and retirement options. We also encourage employees to give back to their communities through our volunteer programs.
   

  

 We’re committed to including people with disabilities at all stages of the employment process. If you require accessibility assistance or accommodation for a disability at any point, let us know by emailing accommodation-request\_mb@oracle.com or by calling 1-888-404-2494 in the United States.
   

  

 Oracle is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability and protected veterans’ status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Oracle will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records pursuant to applicable law.

title: Swedish QA Lead - Remote
description:
**Job Description**
**Job Title:** 
 Swedish Quality Assurance Lead
   

  

**Job Type:** 
 Contract
   

  

**Location:** 
 Remote
   

  

**About This Role**
 In this hourly, remote contractor role, you will work as a Swedish Quality Assurance Lead to oversee quality, consistency, and trainer performance across Swedish AI training projects. You will review AI-generated Swedish content and trainer/QA work, evaluate output quality against project guidelines, provide precise written feedback, and ensure that all contributors follow the expected quality standards. You will assess work for accuracy, fluency, grammar, spelling, tone, cultural appropriateness, meaning preservation, instruction-following, formatting, and adherence to project-specific rubrics. You will spot recurring quality issues, communicate updates to trainers and QAs, support onboarding, maintain documentation, and help activate contributors who are not working consistently. This role requires strong Swedish and English skills, excellent attention to detail, structured communication, and the ability to manage quality workflows across remote teams. This role is a fast-growing AI Data Services company delivering training data for many of the world’s largest AI companies and foundation-model labs. Your Swedish quality leadership will directly help improve the world’s premier AI models by ensuring that Swedish training data is natural, accurate, culturally appropriate, well-documented, and aligned with client expectations. Important: There is no immediate project for this role; however, if qualified, you will be among the first experts we reach out to when relevant opportunities arise. This will also provide you with access to future projects available through our expert network.
   

  

**Your Profile**
* Quality monitoring: Spot-check Swedish items, identify quality issues, provide ongoing feedback through DMs, and escalate recurring or critical issues.
* Trainer and QA communication: Update trainers and QAs on Discord about new item guidelines, project changes, workflow updates, and quality expectations.
* Question handling: Respond to trainer/QA questions clearly and promptly, especially around Swedish wording, grammar, compounds, register, translation fidelity, cultural context, terminology, and edge cases.
* Trainer/QA activation management: DM contributors who are inactive or not working, encourage activation, track follow-ups, and flag availability issues when needed.
* Documentation: Create and maintain Swedish project documentation, including style guides, trackers, FAQs, quality notes, examples, honeypots, and onboarding materials.
* Onboarding and training: Schedule and run onboarding/training calls with trainers and QAs to explain project expectations, workflows, rubrics, quality standards, and Swedish-specific style requirements.
* Quality alignment: Ensure all trainers and QAs apply Swedish language guidelines consistently and understand updates as projects evolve.
* Process improvement: Identify recurring quality gaps, propose workflow improvements, and help build scalable QA processes for Swedish-language projects.


**Key Responsibilities**
* Quality monitoring: Spot-check Swedish items, identify quality issues, provide ongoing feedback through DMs, and escalate recurring or critical issues.
* Trainer and QA communication: Update trainers and QAs on Discord about new item guidelines, project changes, workflow updates, and quality expectations.
* Question handling: Respond to trainer/QA questions clearly and promptly, especially around Swedish wording, grammar, compounds, register, translation fidelity, cultural context, terminology, and edge cases.
* Trainer/QA activation management: DM contributors who are inactive or not working, encourage activation, track follow-ups, and flag availability issues when needed.
* Documentation: Create and maintain Swedish project documentation, including style guides, trackers, FAQs, quality notes, examples, honeypots, and onboarding materials.
* Onboarding and training: Schedule and run onboarding/training calls with trainers and QAs to explain project expectations, workflows, rubrics, quality standards, and Swedish-specific style requirements.
* Quality alignment: Ensure all trainers and QAs apply Swedish language guidelines consistently and understand updates as projects evolve.
* Process improvement: Identify recurring quality gaps, propose workflow improvements, and help build scalable QA processes for Swedish-language projects.

title: Solution Delivery Specialist
description:
**Additional Locations:** Sweden-Helsingborg; N/A

**Diversity - Innovation - Caring - Global Collaboration - Winning Spirit - High Performance**


At Boston Scientific, we’ll give you the opportunity to harness all that’s within you by working in teams of diverse and high-performing employees, tackling some of the most important health industry challenges. With access to the latest tools, information and training, we’ll help you in advancing your skills and career. Here, you’ll be supported in progressing – whatever your ambitions.

  

This role is to be part of the Solution Delivery team, focusing on order automation and process improvements.


This full-time permanent position is to be based from our office in Helsingborg and offers weekly hybrid working (three days in the office, two days remote).

 **Your responsibilities will include:**

* Configure and maintain order processing systems to facilitate accurate, smooth and efficient order entry, such as Esker and EDI.
* Contribute to reach the EMEA/country automation target.
* Actively participate in knowledge sharing / best practice sessions to improve overall knowledge to have a positive impact on automation.
* Contribute on identifying EMEA/country automation blockers and support problem solving projects.
* Ensure timely tasks/projects completion ensuring current policies and practices are followed and keeping accurate documentation.
* Continuously seek and drive improvements by piloting new tools / ideas and sharing these with others to leverage.
* Apply experience and knowledge in a variety of situations to accomplish defined goals at customer, GCX organisation and/or even broader BSC level.
* Support the deployment of Global Customer Experience (GCX) solutions to internal and external customers.
* Impact quality and effectiveness of service activities provided to the customer.

 **What we are looking for in you:**

* Fast learner with a curiosity and aptitude for technical learning.
* Strong interest in automation technologies and willingness to learn new tools and concepts.
* Customer care focus.
* Effective communication and interpersonal skills to collaborate with team members and interact with peers.
* Strong analytical skills and structured thinking.
* Keen attention to detail and accurate data entry.
* Apply as well as share best practices.
* Advanced use of Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
* Experience in usage of SAP and Service Cloud (SalesForce).
* Language required: Any Nordic language and fluent English; other languages would be an advantage.

 **What we can offer to you:**

* A competitive compensation and benefits package.
* Working in an international environment.
* Possibility to make an impact.
* Fast growing and innovative environment.
* Possibility to work on personal development.

 **Requisition ID:** 630354

  

Boston Scientific transforms lives through innovative medical technologies that improve the health of patients around the world. As a global medical technology leader for more than 45 years, we advance science for life by providing a broad range of high-performance solutions that address unmet patient needs and reduce the cost of healthcare. Our portfolio of devices and therapies helps physicians diagnose and treat complex cardiovascular, respiratory, digestive, oncological, neurological and urological diseases and conditions. Learn more at www.bostonscientific.com and follow us on LinkedIn.
company_description: Boston Scientific is dedicated to transforming lives through innovative medical solutions that improve the health of patients around the world.

title: GECX Sales Specialist, Cloud Nordics
description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following: **Stockholm, Sweden; Oslo, Norway**.### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 10 years of experience in a sales role in the enterprise software, cloud space, or AI space.
* Experience promoting the Customer Experience (CX), Generative AI and AI technology stack.
* Experience engaging with, presenting to, and building relationships with executive leaders.
* Ability to travel up to 50% of the time.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Experience identifying AI use cases to solve customer challenges or selling customer experience.
* Experience working with cross-functional teams, including product, field sales, customer engineering, and solution architects to build business cases for transformation and accompanying plans for implementation.
* Experience working with and managing partners in complex implementation projects, including global system integrators and packaged software vendors.
* Experience in a customer industry including: retail, financial services/retail banking, insurance, telecommunications, automotive, and Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG).
* Understanding of regional or local and industry data privacy and security rules and regulations.

**About the job**
-----------------



As a Gemini Enterprise Customer Experience Sales (GECX) Specialist, you will be responsible for growing our Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience (CX) business by building and expanding relationships with new and existing customers. You will possess the necessary selling skills to effectively build relationships with both AI Sales Specialists (AISS), Cloud Field Sales Representatives (FSRs), Customer Engineers (CEs) as well as new and existing customers.


You will develop relationships with external customer stakeholders, identifying innovative ways to multiply your impact and the impact of the team as a whole. You will partner with internal Google Cloud sales teams to grow their Customer Experience (CX) businesses and drive overall value for Google Cloud business cycles, including a combination of expansion agreements, as well as working with product teams to help our customers build new products leveraging our AI.
It's an exciting time to join Google Cloud’s Go-To-Market team, leading the AI revolution for businesses worldwide. You’ll work by leveraging Google's brand credibility—a legacy built on inventing foundational technologies and proven at scale. We’ll provide you with the world's most advanced AI portfolio, including frontier Gemini models, and the complete Vertex AI platform, helping you to solve business problems. We’re a collaborative culture providing direct access to DeepMind's engineering and research minds, empowering you to solve customer challenges. Join us to be the catalyst for our mission, drive customer success, and define the new cloud era—the market is yours.


Individual pay is determined by factors including job-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training.
  

  

Sweden: kr1080000 - kr1110000 (SEK) + 100% bonus target + equity + benefits  

  

Learn more about benefits at Google.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Build and maintain executive relationships with customers as the Gemini Enterprise for customer experience subject matter expert, manage complex business cycles, identify suitable use cases for Google Cloud solutions, and influence the long-term strategic direction of your accounts.
* Manage objectives and key results to deliver against quota and achieve or exceed strategic business and growth goals while accurately forecasting and reporting the state of the business for your assigned territory.
* Work with Google accounts and cross-functional teams (e.g., Customer Engineering, Marketing, Customer Success, Product, Engineering, and Partner Ecosystem) to develop go-to-market strategies, drive pipeline, understand the customer, and provide excellence prospect and customer experience.
* Assist customers in identifying GECX and AI use cases suitable for Google Cloud AI products and solutions.
* Articulate key solution differentiators and the measurable business impact.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: E2E Telco Architect
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Architecture
* ID 503654-en\_US
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


**Your role**  

As an **E2E Telco Architect at Capgemini Engineering**, you will be responsible for leading the design and delivery of advanced telecom architectures across multi-domain networks. You will leverage your expertise within Packet Core and IMS to create scalable, high-performing, and secure solutions, while working closely with customers and cross-functional teams.
  

  

**In this role you will play a key role in:**


* Designing and defining end-to-end telecom architecture covering 4G EPC, 5G Core (NSA/SA), IMS (VoLTE/VoNR), and MCX applications
* Leading solution architecture across Core, RAN, Transport, NFVI/Cloud, and OSS domains
* Driving Packet Core and IMS design, including components such as AMF/MME, SMF, UPF, PCF, UDM, P-/S-CSCF, TAS, HSS
* Ensuring end-to-end integration, service validation, and performance optimisation, including QoS frameworks (QCI/5QI)
* Engaging with customers to translate requirements into solution blueprints, HLDs and LLDs, and providing technical leadership throughout the delivery lifecycle
  

  

**Your profile**
* Bachelor’s/master’s degree in Telecommunications, Electronics, or related field
* 10+ years of telecom experience with relevant architecture exposure
* Strong experience in 4G/5G Packet Core architecture and related protocols. Hands-on knowledge of IMS/VoLTE/VoNR architecture and signalling (SIP, Diameter)
* Solid understanding of end-to-end telecom networks (Core, RAN, IP Transport, Security)
* Experience working with virtualisation, SDN/NFV, and cloud-native telco environments
* Fluency in English; Swedish language skills are advantageous
  

  

**What we believe you will enjoy about working here**
* Working with cutting-edge telecom technologies, including 5G Core and cloud-native architectures
* Opportunities to contribute to large-scale transformation projects for leading telecom clients
* Being part of a collaborative, international, and highly skilled team
* Continuous learning opportunities and strong career development support
  

  

**Application**  

  

**This role requires Swedish citizenship and is subject to security classification, meaning that a security screening will be carried out in accordance with Swedish legislation.**  

  

As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.
About Capgemini
  

Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology, and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of over 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2025 global revenues of €22.5 billion. Make it real | www.capgemini.com
company_description: Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value.

title: Senior VMware-konsult
description:
Tillväxtresan inom vårt datacenter-affär fortsätter och just nu söker vi en erfaren konsult inom VMware för att stärka upp vår konsultgruppering i regionen. I rollen kommer du arbeta nära tillsammans med en mycket senior kollega inom samma affärsområde, vilket ger dig goda möjligheter till både kunskapsutbyte och fortsatt utveckling.



Vill du bidra med din kompetens inom Broadcom/VMware och möta nya människor och miljöer, samtidigt som du får stora möjligheter att utvecklas i din yrkesroll? Fint! Då är du varmt välkommen till oss på Atea. Vi har spännande kunduppdrag och du har expertisen!


**Din roll**
------------



I rollen som VMware-konsult kommer du få möjlighet att arbeta med en bredd av olika kunder och uppdrag tack vare bland annat våra starka partnerskap samt vår storlek på marknaden. Rollen kan innebära både långa heltidsuppdrag såväl som att ha flera spännande uppdrag löpande parallellt. Ditt ansvar är att hjälpa kunderna vidare med deras initiativ kopplat till VMware som plattform, leverera bästa möjliga service, samt aktivt arbeta för att rådge dem i deras resa framåt i tätt samarbete med våra säljare och arkitekter.



Hos oss får du:


* Arbeta med design, implementation, felsökning, förvaltning och utveckling av våra kunders VMware-plattformar och IT-infrastruktur
* Delta i projekt och uppdrag som teknisk rådgivare och/eller utförare samt leverera dokumentation efter utsatta krav
* Agera teknisk specialist och rådgivare (såväl internt som mot kund inom ditt/dina kompetensområden)
* Genomföra förstudier, analyser och workshops ute hos våra kunder
* Samarbeta med våra arkitekter och specialistsäljare vid framtagandet av design och lösningar inom Datacenter-plattformar
* Löpande utveckla din kompetens genom utbildning/certifiering samt genom att omvärldsbevaka och uppdatera dig gällande vad som händer på marknaden

**Vem är du?**
--------------



I konsultrollen är du flexibel och trivs med att samarbeta med andra. Du uppskattar möjligheten att möta nya kunder och arbeta i en varierande vardag. Du är självgående och tar ansvar för dina uppgifter, strukturerar och prioriterar ditt arbete och driver dina processer framåt. Du söker aktivt efter nya utmaningar samt utvecklingsmöjligheter hos kunden, både för egen del såväl som för möjligheter för andra konsultkollegor.



För tjänsten som konsult inom VMware ser vi att du har:


* Flertalet års erfarenhet av arbete med VMware´s produkter
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med lösningar inom virtualisering av VMware-plattformar, infrastruktur och datacenter
* Erfarenhet av arbete med IT-infrastruktur inom datacenter från ett hårdvaruperspektiv (Dell, HPE, backup/DR och liknande)
* Svenskt medborgarskap (krävs på grund av säkerhetsklassning hos kund)
* Är obehindrad i svenska och engelska språket, både i tal och skrift
* B-körkort


Det anses vara meriterande om du har:


* Erfarenhet av att arbeta som konsult
* Hög kompetens inom VMware NSX samt VMware Cloud Foundation
* God kompetens inom VMware Aria Automation
* Relevanta certifikat inom ovan produktområden (VCP, VCAP, VCIX)

**Om Atea**
-----------



Visste du att Atea är den ledande leverantören av it-infrastruktur i Norden och Baltikum? I Sverige är vi runt 2700 medarbetare fördelade på 35 kontor runt om i hela landet. Vår styrka ligger i vår kombination av lokal närvaro, vårt omfattande och heltäckande erbjudande samt alla våra specialister. Tillsammans med våra kunder och partners bygger vi Sverige med it och förbättra vardagen för skolbarn, lärare, äldre, sjukvård och näringslivet. Hos oss får du vara en del av världens mest hållbara it-servicebolag, där vi är med och påskyndar omställningen mot en mer hållbar it-värld.



På Atea blir du en del av en vardag och en kultur som präglas av framåtanda, laganda och humor. Vi har en vision om att vara "The Place to Be" – en plats där alla växer och trivs, med kollegor som bryr sig om dig, om kunderna och om samhället.


**Kontakt & mer information**
-----------------------------



Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta Eric Ljungström, Konsultchef, via eric.ljungstrom@atea.se. Har du frågor om rekryteringsprocessen är du välkommen att höra av dig till Alexandra Engman, TA-partner, via alexandra.engman@atea.se. Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum, ansök därmed redan idag!



I den här rekryteringen kan arbetspsykologiska tester användas som en del av urvalsprocessen. Som en kvalitativ del i vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår slutkandidater en bakgrundskontroll för vissa av våra tjänster, detta för att öka kännedomen om dig som vår framtida medarbetare.



Vår arbetssätt är flexibelt - Vi tror på att ge möjlighet till flexibilitet i vardagen men merparten av arbetstiden som vi inte spenderar hos en kund eller på resande fot utgår vi från kontoret, som är vår primära arbetsplats.  

  

Atea vill vara The Place To Be, den självklara platsen, för alla människor då vi värdesätter och jobbar aktivt med mångfald och inkludering.



Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!


*Den här rekryteringen hanteras av oss på Atea och vi undanber oss därför samtal och mail från rekryterings- och bemanningsföretag*.

  

**Följ oss i sociala medier**

  

#LI-ONSITE


  
Stad
Eskilstuna, Kalmar, Karlskrona, Karlstad, Jönköping, Linköping, Norrköping, Nyköping, Skara, Västerås, Växjö, Örebro
Sista ansökan
2026-08-31

title: IS Functional Analyst ERP Integrations
description:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.


This role sits within ABB's Robotics business, a leading global robotics company. We're entering an exciting new chapter as we’ve announced the plan for SoftBank Group to acquire ABB Robotics. SoftBank is a globally recognized technology group and investor/operator focused on AI, robotics, and next-generation computing. By joining us now, you’ll be part of a pioneering team shaping the future of robotics—working alongside world-class experts in a fast-moving, innovation-driven environment.


This Position reports to:


IS Manager  

We are building a world-class global IS/IT organization for ABB Robotics from the ground up. This is a rare opportunity to join us at a pivotal moment in our digital transformation journey. We're creating a modern, secure, and scalable technology landscape to support our global sales, service, and production operations.


As a SAP BTP Specialist for Integrations and Platform Services, you will be instrumental in architecting and operating the cloud-based integration backbone that connects our ERP ecosystem and enables innovation at scale. You'll work at the intersection of strategy and execution, collaborating with ERP teams, security leaders, and external partners to deliver a clean core, a robust integration landscape, and a future-ready platform that supports a global robotics business.


The work model for the role is hybrid. #LI-hybrid


This is a global role; the preferred locations India, Sweden, Germany, Italy, Spain, Czech Republic, Poland, Hungary, Portugal, or the United States.

**Your responsibilities:**

* **Design and operate SAP BTP infrastructure** by managing subaccounts, entitlements, and platform services across development, test, and production environments, ensuring optimal performance, cost transparency, and operational stability
* **Architect and govern integrations** by designing, implementing, and maintaining robust integrations between SAP S/4HANA Cloud and non-SAP systems using SAP Integration Suite, while maintaining clean core principles through BTP extensions
* **Develop cloud applications** and extensions by leveraging SAP BTP services such as Build Apps, Build Process Automation, HANA Cloud, and ABAP Environment to deliver innovative solutions aligned with business needs
* **Create technical blueprints** using in-depth platform knowledge to define solution feasibility, implementation approaches, and interactions with existing systems while optimizing cost-effectiveness
* **Monitor and optimize** platform performance by tracking consumption metrics, identifying variances, and proposing counteractions to ensure efficient resource utilization and scalability.
* **Troubleshoot integration failures** and coordinate issue resolution with platform teams or SAP support.
* **Provide technical expertise and mentoring** by offering in-depth knowledge, guidance, and training to resolve integration challenges, support implementation projects, and develop team capabilities
* **Drive continuous improvement** by assessing efficiency opportunities of emerging technologies and industry trends, and recommending enhancements based on technological, financial, and functional feasibility

**Qualifications for the role:**

* Minimum 10 years of hands-on experience in SAP integrations, middleware, or cloud application development
* Strong expertise with SAP BTP Integration Suite and deep understanding of SAP S/4HANA integration patterns and clean core principles
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field
* Demonstrated ability to troubleshoot complex integration scenarios and performance issues in production environments
* Strong knowledge of the SAP ecosystem, cloud platforms, and integration technologies
* Experience with SAP HANA Cloud, CAP, Event Mesh, or SAP Build tools is highly valued
* Proven track record working in global organizations with cross-regional stakeholders and complex technical landscapes
* Fluent in English with strong communication skills across technical and business audiences
* Proactive, curious, and solution-oriented mindset with a collaborative approach; comfortable balancing innovation with governance and security

**What’s in it for you:**


We empower you to take the lead, share bold ideas, and shape real outcomes. You’ll grow through hands-on experience, mentorship, and learning that fits your goals. Here, your work doesn’t just matter, it moves things forward

  

We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

**Fraud Warning:** Any genuine offer from ABB will always be preceded by a formal application and interview process.  

We never ask for money from job applicants.


For current open positions you can visit our career website https://global.abb/group/en/careers and apply.


Please refer to detailed recruitment fraud caution notice using the link https://global.abb/group/en/careers/how-to-apply/fraud-warning.

title: System Analyst - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
Malmö, Sweden


* Full-time
* Application and Product Development
* Hybrid
* Tieto Caretech

  
Job Description **At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide patients and end users with purposeful technology and product offerings that help them in their life. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.**

**About us**


Through advanced, intuitive technology, Tieto Caretech reduces administrative work, improves decision-making, and strengthens safety and quality in health and social care. With the Lifecare software portfolio we enable health and social care professionals to focus on what matters most: people.


We are a global team of professionals working on providing products and services to different sectors from intensive care to laboratory and social care. In addition to working closely with our customers, we also have our own products that we build and develop for various fields in society. From enabling healthcare professionals to spend more valuable time with their patients to providing data for professional athletes to achieve even better results, we make all that possible. With us you can be part of advancing societies through purposeful technology and make your mark on the health and wellbeing of people.  



**About the role**


As a Systems Analyst, you will play a key role in developing our offerings in health informatics, information architecture, and digital transformation. In this role, you will combine technical expertise with a strong understanding of healthcare processes.


You will act as a bridge between healthcare operations, archival functions, system managers, and other stakeholders, with the goal of ensuring that healthcare information is accurate, accessible, and preserved over the long term.


A key part of the role is to support regions, authorities, and healthcare providers in information management, information structuring, and archiving of healthcare information. You will work with the entire information lifecycle—from creation and use to preservation, disposal, and transfer to e-archives.

***While we've listed several skills and experiences that we believe would be beneficial for this role, please don't be discouraged if you don't tick every box.***

 **Your responsibilities:**

* Analyzing, mapping, and modeling healthcare information based on business needs, regulations, and national standards.
* Conducting information inventories in preparation for system decommissioning and deliveries to e-archives.
* Analyzing databases and data models to identify information content, metadata, relationships, and preservation values.
* Mapping health data from one source to another.
* Designing and reviewing submission specifications for the transfer of information to e-archives in accordance with applicable standards and archival requirements.

 **Qualifications**


To succeed in this role, you have experience from the healthcare sector and a solid understanding of the opportunities and challenges associated with digitalization, information management, and regulation-driven information handling.


You are analytical, structured, and responsible. You enjoy working both independently and collaboratively with other specialists. You communicate easily with both business representatives and technical experts and are able to translate complex requirements into practical solutions.

* Experience in analyzing and structuring health data.
* Knowledge of information standards such as OpenEHR, HL7 FHIR, or equivalent.
* Experience with terminologies and classifications such as SNOMED CT and ICD-10.
* Experience working with e-archives, data extraction, data migration, or system decommissioning.
* Fluency in Swedish, both spoken and written.

 **Meritorious Experience**

* Clinical experience from the healthcare sector.
* Experience in developing or reviewing submission specifications for e-archives.
* Experience in requirements management, business analysis, or project management.
* Experience working with electronic health record systems or other healthcare-related IT systems.

 **What’s in it for you?**

With us you will be part of the important and meaningful work of developing healthcare for all of us. You have an important mission to make a difference that really matters. In addition, as a company we offer you professional growth, open and friendly culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working.


Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle. We want to encourage you to keep up that curiosity and deepen your knowledge on topics you’re interested in. For example, we host a ‘Keep Learning Week’ twice a year, a week where everyone at Tieto has the possibility to join different training courses in a truly global setting.

 **Could you be our new colleague?**


We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager Vidar Lervik @ vidar.lervik@tieto.com

 *We perform background checks on all final candidates.*

*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion | Sustainability | Tieto


  
We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.
company_description: At the heart of Tieto are our people – collaborators, creators, and problem-solvers who bring innovations to life. Join us !
